Ioan Gruffudd and Robert Lindsay star

programme.title: Bend of the River (1952)
programme.desc: A trail guide saves a thief from being lynched and recruits him to help guide a party of settlers across the country. Once the homesteaders have reached their destination, the two men agree to go for supplies, but on the way back, the thief plots to sell their goods to a gold-mining camp. Western, starring James Stewart, Arthur Kennedy, Rock Hudson, Lori Nelson, Jay C Flippen and Julie Adams

programme.title: European Cup Winners: Nottingham Forest
programme.desc: Between 1977 and 1984 English football teams dominated the European Cup and Nottingham Forest, under charismatic manager Brian Clough, lifted the famous trophy twice. Gabriel Clarke looks at how Clough and his assistant Peter Taylor built a championship-winning team and then shocked the world of football by dominating its premier club competition two years in a row. Featuring highlights of both of those finals and interviews with some of the key individuals involved

programme.title: Darts: European Championship Live
programme.desc: Jacqui Oatley presents coverage of the semi-finals and final on day four from Konig Pilsener Arena in Oberhausen, Germany. Rob Cross and Gerwyn Price reached the showpiece match last year with victories over Daryl Gurney and Michael Smith respectively, and Cross went on to prevail 11-6 in the final. With analysis from Chris Mason and Alan Warriner-Little, and commentary by Stuart Pyke and John Rawling

programme.title: Cycling: La Vuelta a Espana Highlights 2020
programme.desc: Action from stage 12, with riders tackling a 109.2km course from Pola de Laviana to Alto de l'Angliru. Gary Imlach presents, with Daniel Friebe reporting and Ned Boulting and David Millar on commentary

programme.title: Car Crash Global: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Dash-cam footage of accidents and spectacular smashes, featuring clips from France and China and the top five bizarre cyclists from around the globe

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle infiltrate a gang smuggling art treasures and industrial secrets out of the country and selling them on to foreign powers. programme.desc: A lovelorn, smooth-talking minstrel turns to Robin and his outlaw band for help in rescuing his beloved from the Sheriff of Nottingham's clutches. Michael Praed stars

programme.desc: A gambler is robbed of his winnings and calls on Arthur and Terry to help him track the money down. Comedy drama, guest starring Anthony Valentine and featuring an early appearance by Marina Sirtis (Star Trek: The Next Generation). With George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A recently released convict causes chaos when he takes a group of hospital patients hostage. Bodie and Doyle try to get to him before he can start shooting. Drama, starring Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A suspect collapses while being questioned and rushed to hospital with injuries likely to have been incurred in an assault. Gwen Taylor guest stars in the police drama, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A notorious hard-nosed villain offers to co-operate with the police and gives himself up in return for protection for his wife and their children, so Bodie and Doyle are assigned to perform the task. Crime drama, starring Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: ITV Sport Stories
programme.desc: Gabriel Clarke introduces a selection of interviews, clips and profiles from the ITV archives featuring some of the biggest names in sport. In the first edition, Muhammad Ali discusses his ban from boxing and the Rumble in the Jungle, and takes part in an impromptu sparring session, while Brian Clough has a heated on-screen debate with Don Revie, his predecessor at Leeds. Plus, a revealing portrait of Welsh rugby talisman Alun Wyn Jones

programme.title: World of Sport

programme.title: Snooker: Champion of Champions Live
programme.desc: Coverage of the evening session on day two from Marshall Arena in Milton Keynes, featuring a group final, played over the best of 11 frames. Mark Allen was in good form at this stage last year as he comfortably overcame third seed Mark Selby 6-2, but he was to meet his match against Judd Trump in the semi-finals. Presented by Jill Douglas with analysis from Stephen Hendry, Neal Foulds and Alan McManus, and commentary by David Hendon and Phil Yates

programme.title: Lethal Weapon

programme.desc: Between 1977 and 1984 English football teams dominated the European Cup and Nottingham Forest, under charismatic manager Brian Clough, lifted the famous trophy twice. Gabriel Clarke looks at how Clough and his assistant Peter Taylor built a championship-winning team and then shocked the world of football by dominating its premier club competition two years in a row. Featuring highlights of both of those finals and interviews with some of the key individuals involved

programme.title: Darts: European Championship Live
programme.desc: Jacqui Oatley presents coverage of the semi-finals and final on day four from Konig Pilsener Arena in Oberhausen, Germany. Rob Cross and Gerwyn Price reached the showpiece match last year with victories over Daryl Gurney and Michael Smith respectively, and Cross went on to prevail 11-6 in the final. With analysis from Chris Mason and Alan Warriner-Little, and commentary by Stuart Pyke and John Rawling

programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Howard face problems when they file for a patent for their infinite persistence gyroscope. Plus, Penny, Amy and Bernadette give Raj dating advice when Emily reaches out to him after their breakup. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is shocked at a revelation from Sheldon after she buys him a new laptop, while Raj sells out Leonard and Howard after they lie to their wives in order to attend an early screening of a movie. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: On a weekend cabin trip with Penny and Amy, Sheldon spills one of Leonard's secrets, while Howard and Bernadette must draw a line when Raj goes overboard with pregnancy gifts. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon disagree over whether to continue holding their regular Roommate Agreement meetings, with Leonard suggesting they are no longer required, while Sheldon believes they are still essential. As the pair's squabble quickly escalates into a full-blown argument, the rest of their friends turn up for a planned Game of Thrones viewing party, and end up taking sides in the dispute - resulting in two warring factions taking up residence in 4A and 4B. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A dejected Mr Burns tries to improve his public image by taking part in a series of lowbrow radio talk shows and bringing the legendary Loch Ness monster to Springfield. With the voice of Michael McKean

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa joins Mensa and inspires the local intelligentsia to take over Springfield. Determined to build a better world, they decide to transform the town into a utopia - but go too far and cause a riot. With the guest voice of Stephen Hawking

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and the family set off for a cheap break in Japan, where they get stranded and find themselves forced to take part in a shocking game show to win tickets for the flight home. Featuring the voice of Star Trek veteran George Takei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge has plastic surgery in an effort to lose weight, but a mix-up results in her being given breast implants instead - much to Homer's delight. With the guest voices of Adam West and Burt Ward, stars of 1960s TV series Batman

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer talk to Fearne Cotton, Andrew Marr, Jack Whitehall, Richard and Judy, and Dizzee Rascal. Plus, there is music by Nothing But Thieves

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa attends a performing arts camp, where guitar-playing counsellors and musically inclined youngsters teach her to embrace her creative side. Meanwhile, Bart and Homer accompany Just the Clown to Norway, where he hopes to collect a Nobel Prize for his contributions to the comedy world. With the guest voices of Jemaine Clement and Bret McKenzie of Flight of the Conchords, and Glee stars Lea Michele, Cory Monteith and Amber Riley

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa gives each member of the family $50, and Lisa anonymously donates her money to Nelson to support his dream of making custom bicycles. During a visit to an upmarket department store, Marge decides to buy an expensive handbag and promises Homer she will return it. When the item is successfully returned for a full refund, despite signs of wear and tear, Homer is inspired to buy things he cannot afford with the intention of taking them back at a later date

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host the show's first ever Japanese week. For the signature challenge the bakers tackle a Japanese version of the Asian staple, steamed buns, while the technical round involves a tricky recipe involving multiple layers. The showstopper round is themed around kawaii - the Japanese love of all things cute

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction (2014)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots are driven into hiding when the human race turns against them. When rediscovered by a kindly inventor and his daughter, they come out of exile to save the world, battling a new breed of human-created Transformers. These deadly new machines were created to hunt them down, but are now growing independent and intend to make use of technology from the Transformers' home planet in a plot that could threaten all life on Earth. Fourth film in the sci-fi adventure series, starring Mark Wahlberg, Stanley Tucci and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Steve Jones and David Coulthard present action from the 13th round of the campaign, held at Autodromo Internazionale Enzo e Dino Ferrari in Imola, Italy. Both previous Italian races this season have been action-packed, and with limited practice time and the fact that, out of the current crop of drivers, only Kimi Räikkönen has experience of this track with F1, this race promised to be interesting

programme.title: The Bridge
programme.desc: The team wakes up to the realisation that more than half of the bridge still needs building - and that they will likely lose a team member too. With rumours spreading through the camp that a splinter group are plotting to vote someone out, it soon transpires that the whispers are part of an intricately calculated game plan to crown a new leader

programme.title: American Nightmare: Trump's Breadline Kids
programme.desc: Ahead of the US elections, this documentary follows three children and their families in the battleground state of Ohio, where the Covid-19 pandemic has intensified their struggle to stay afloat. As the US also reckons with issues of race and racism, the youngsters share their worries and hopes about their futures

programme.title: Random Acts
programme.desc: Dev Griffin introduces new films from cutting-edge black filmmakers - Anne Fearon's Motherhood, Isaac Tomiczek's Vacant Bass, Rikki Henry's Venus/Mars, Abdou Cisse's Enough, and Denise Alder's Mablo Micasso

programme.title: Before I Go to Sleep (2014)
programme.desc: A woman who cannot retain her memories following a traumatic accident is contacted by a mysterious neuropsychologist, who offers to help her recover the truth about her condition. As she tries to piece together the events of her past, she begins to fear neither her husband nor the doctor are who they seem to be. Thriller, starring Nicole Kidman, Colin Firth and Mark Strong

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by celebrity guests Sandi Toksvig and Desiree Burch for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for the Grasshopper Also in Carlstadt, New Jersey, a family-owned Irish restaurant. There, he lends a helping hand to Mitch Sandler, who has been struggling to live up to the expectations of his father-in-law since he invested heavily in the business. The chef also tries to improve the presentation of dishes emerging from the kitchen

programme.title: Nazi Treasure Hunters
programme.desc: A team of experts attempts to track down art looted from across Europe under Hitler's orders, with items worth billions still missing to this day. In Austria, Conor Woodman explores the salt mine where Allied soldiers recovered the majority of Hitler's stolen art in 1945, but meets local treasure hunters and investigative journalists who are convinced some of it was smuggled out and is today hidden in nearby homes and mountain hideouts

programme.title: Vet on the Hill
programme.desc: Scott Miller performs a double knee operation on a Yorkshire terrier, a labrador has some worrying lumps and three ferrets need vasectomies

programme.title: Fifteen to One
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts the general knowledge quiz in which 15 contestants try to win a place in the end-of-series final, when a £40,000 jackpot will be up for grabs

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Vince tries to strike up a friendship with Mike by inviting him to a crucial basketball game, but Molly is not impressed by their new-found bond

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Peggy asks Molly to look after her dog when she is admitted to hospital for gall bladder surgery, and Mike gives his girlfriend cause for concern when he starts to talk about where he would like to be buried when he dies. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam's relationship with Diane hangs in the balance as he makes an unexpected proposal of marriage. Ted Danson and Shelley Long star

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane has a change of heart and rushes to Cape Cod to tell Sam - who has also had second thoughts and wants to go back to playing the field. Starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra are shocked to realise they have virtually nothing to talk about except the kids, and resolve to take more of an interest in each other's hobbies

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is disturbed to learn Michael and Geoffrey are playing fairies in the school play, especially as they chose the roles themselves. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton, Sullivan Sweeten and Sawyer Sweeten

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Stefania, the woman Robert fell head over heels in love with during his holiday in Italy, turns up out of the blue with her father - but soon outstays her welcome. Comedy, guest starring Alex Meneses and David Proval

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink resents his lack of privacy now that he has to share his apartment with his father and Daphne, while Roz debates the virtues of human contact. Kelsey Grammer stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier agree to eat at Martin's favourite restaurant, but are not prepared for its laid-back atmosphere. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and John Mahoney

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jeff Young, co-owner of custom signs company Yesco, goes undercover wanting to ensure that each franchise location follows corporate protocol and is meeting the needs of its staff. He meets staff members who have suffered bereavements, heart attacks and homelessness but still remain dedicated to their jobs

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Includes headlines and weather

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarella's in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leone's in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant

programme.title: Steph's Packed Lunch

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: DIY fanatic Fiona contends with sub-zero temperatures as she sets out to renovate a chateau bedroom for her daughter, who is due to visit in two months, while new owners Erin and JB aim to transform the first floor of their property's south wing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in Portsmouth at the Seacrest Hotel, where owner Antoinette Stretton and general manager Carmen Cretu hope their experience will set them apart

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Choir teacher Dionne hosts the first of five parties from in and around Leeds, hoping her menu inspired by family favourites will impress Billy, Jane, Darren and Denver

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The 28th season of the animated comedy kicks off with an episode that sees Mr Burns put on a variety show at the Springfield Bowl in exchange for rebuilding the town after it is burned to the ground. With the guest voice of Amy Schumer

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Verity is lost for words when she sees Diane's new look and knows that her father, Edward, is behind the image change. Tom and Yazz come up with a wedding theme

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: As the furlough scheme comes to an end, the programme follows the response to a job advert for a minimum-wage server role at a Manchester restaurant. Almost 1,000 people apply, including Katie, a cabin services attendant; Faye, a cruise ship dancer; Jake, a hotel manager; and John, a ticket inspector. We get to know them, as well as Abi, the recruitment consultant in charge of narrowing down the field; and Kerry, a mum-of-two who lost her job at Bentley and is desperate to find a new position to avoid the family losing their home. Through the lens of this one position, Dispatches explores the jobs crisis brought on by Covid that is threatening to push unemployment over three million by Christmas

programme.title: Food Unwrapped Investigates
programme.desc: Kate Quilton investigates the 2019 listeria outbreak in UK hospitals that left six dead and asks if enough is being done to protect vulnerable patients from a failing food safety system. She meets scientists to uncover just what listeria is and how the outbreak happened, goes inside a hospital kitchen to see first-hand how ood is made and speaks with an anonymous government whistleblower who reveals cutbacks could mean another deadly outbreak will happen again

programme.title: The Bridge
programme.desc: There is nasty shock as the group members wake up to discover that former team-mate Luke has sabotaged their progress in exchange for £10,000 from the prize fund. Zac finds it hard to believe that his best friend would do such a thing and considers throwing in the towel, while newly elected leader Rowan is in the firing line. In the most testing of final days, can the team pull together, rebuild the bridge and reach the money?

programme.title: Deliveroo: Secrets of Your Takeaway
programme.desc: The behind-the-scenes story of how Britain's fastest-growing food delivery company has revolutionised the takeaway industry and how they, and their restaurant partners, are navigating the storm of the coronavirus pandemic. Cameras follow the teams of computer programmers, app developers and salespeople as they manage a network of restaurants and delivery riders that together have transformed the takeaway experience

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including This Morning, The Million Pound Cube, Strictly Come Dancing, The Undoing, The Yorkshire Vet, First Dates, BBC news reports on the US election and a BBC Breakfast report on the Welsh shopping ban

programme.title: Married at First Sight
programme.desc: The couples are brought together for a special retreat as they wrestle with the big decision - whether they should give their new marriages a chance or get divorced. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eatery's decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brother's trust before he can save their business

programme.title: American Nightmare: Trump's Breadline Kids

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Cheers

Can the chef break Tom's iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Finance director Jane hosts the second night in Leeds. Her plan to grab the grand is to treat her guests to a night of fine dining, but she has her work cut out. Drama teacher Denver is already on the back foot with Jane, after taking offence to being called a 'goth' on the first night. Car painter Darren is concerned that Jane's menu of home-made ravioli, pork and panna cotta could win the week, but he's less impressed when it gets to the table. Painter and decorator Billy has noticed a chilling change among some of the other diners and Dionne is just glad her night is out the way so she can enjoy the rest of the week

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges
programme.desc: For years, London's East End was denied a new bridge because of the need to guarantee passage of ships up and down the Thames. For years, the greatest engineers of the age hunted for a design that would keep both road and water traffic moving. As Rob Bell explains, the solution came from architect Horace Jones, whose revolutionary design, with its thousand-tonne opening sections, was powered by nothing more than water. Rob also explains the bridge was lucky to survive the Second World War, having been a target for German V-1 flying bombs

programme.title: Philpott: 5 Mistakes That Caught the Killer
programme.desc: The errors made by Mick Philpott that led to his arrest for causing the death of five of his children and their half-brother by setting light to his home in Derby. The programme examines how his unconvincing appearance at a press conference and ill-timed attendance of a karaoke party raised the police's suspicions - leading them to bug his hotel room and hear an incriminating conversation

The property expert insists, however, and Sheila can only look on in dismay as vivid colours make way for inoffensive neutral shades, stencilled drawings are removed and carpets receive an industrial-strength cleaning

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians (2012)
programme.desc: Magical beings from folklore, including Santa Claus, Jack Frost and the Easter Bunny, join forces to defeat the plans of an evil spirit, who intends to steal the dreams of children and use the power they grant him to dominate the world. Animated adventure, with the voices of Chris Pine, Alec Baldwin, Hugh Jackman, Isla Fisher and Jude Law

programme.title: FernGully: The Last Rainforest (1992)
programme.desc: A fairy living in a forest encounters a member of a lumber crew and magically shrinks him down to her size. He learns about the damage humans are doing to the area, and helps defend it when his fellow loggers unwittingly unleash an evil spirit that had been entombed in a tree. Animated adventure, with the voices of Robin Williams, Christian Slater and Tim Curry

programme.title: A Dog's Purpose (2017)
programme.desc: A dog is reincarnated as different breeds over several generations, with multiple owners and with a variety of names, but he is fated to be reacquainted, decades later, with his original owner. Comedy drama, starring Dennis Quaid, with the voice of Josh Gad

programme.title: Congo (1995)
programme.desc: An expedition to find King Solomon's diamond mines in the jungles of the Congo disappears without trace. The tycoon behind the mission sends his assistant, a former CIA agent, to find out what became of the explorers - only to discover that the party met a grisly fate at the hands of a horde of vicious apes. Action adventure based on Michael Crichton's novel, with Dylan Walsh, Laura Linney, Tim Curry and Grant Heslov

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2 (2015)
programme.desc: A Cappella group the Barden Bellas enjoy an unprecedented run of success, until a disastrous performance sees them banned from national competitions and beset by scandal. They attempt to turn their fortunes around and redeem their reputation by competing in the World Championships of A Cappella in Copenhagen. Comedy sequel, starring Anna Kendrick and Rebel Wilson

programme.title: A Quiet Place (2018)
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic world, a family is forced to live in silence while hiding from monsters with hypersensitive hearing. Horror, starring Emily Blunt and John Krasinski, who also directed

programme.title: Blue Velvet (1986)
programme.desc: A college student discovers a severed ear in a field, and is drawn into the dangerous underworld of his apparently peaceful home town. As events unfold, his curiosity leads him to the sinister relationship between a violent sociopath and a beautiful singer, whose vulnerability and sexuality bewitch him. David Lynch's thriller, starring Kyle MacLachlan, Dennis Hopper, Isabella Rossellini and Dean Stockwell

programme.title: The Love Witch (2016)
programme.desc: Modern-day witch Elaine Parks is starting a new life in the small town of Arcata, where she aims to use potions, concoctions and spells to enchant her perfect man. Comedy horror, starring Samantha Robinson, with Laura Waddell, Gian Keys, Robert Seeley and Jennifer Ingrum

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: A series of half hour programmes aimed at reflecting the interests, needs and aspirations of the sign language community

programme.title: Hondo (1953)
programme.desc: A hard-boiled cavalry scout with a feral dog as companion stumbles across a woman and her child stranded on their homestead deep inside hostile territory. Despite repeated attacks by the Apaches, they refuse to leave their home, leaving the scout with no choice but to stay and defend her. Western, starring John Wayne, Geraldine Page, Ward Bond and Michael Pate

programme.title: Man in the Saddle (1951)
programme.desc: A wealthy and ambitious cattleman plans to seize all the land surrounding his own. A peaceful rancher living nearby ignores warnings to sell up and avoid a conflict, and as he suffers a campaign of intimidation, he is forced to adopt violent methods to defend his livelihood. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Alexander Knox, Joan Leslie and Ellen Drew

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Too Much (1956)
programme.desc: An American couple on holiday in Morocco witness the killing of a local man they have befriended. Before dying he whispers a secret that has serious political implications - but they are prevented from telling the police when their son is kidnapped by a gang of spies bent on keeping them silent. Alfred Hitchcock's remake of his own 1934 thriller, with James Stewart, Doris Day, Bernard Miles and Daniel Gelin. Featuring Day's performance of Oscar-winning song Whatever Will Be, Will Be (Que Sera, Sera)

programme.title: Track of the Cat (1954)
programme.desc: A troubled family starts to fall apart during a harsh winter in 19th-century northern California while staving off the menacing presence of a predator - until a tragic accident finally brings matters to a head. Western melodrama, starring Robert Mitchum, Teresa Wright and Diana Lynn

programme.title: Daddy's Home (2015)
programme.desc: A mild-mannered man hopes for his wife's two children to view him as their father. His dreams of perfect family life are threatened by the return of their biological father, a charismatic, motorcycle-riding tough guy, and he pulls out all the stops to prove to his stepchildren that he can be just as cool. Comedy, starring Will Ferrell and Mark Wahlberg

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit (2014)
programme.desc: A former soldier injured in the line of duty takes up a new career as a financial analyst for the CIA. However, his deskbound position changes to a dangerous undercover assignment when he discovers a plot to destroy the US economy. Spy thriller inspired by Tom Clancy's series of novels, starring Chris Pine, Keira Knightley, Kevin Costner and Kenneth Branagh, who also directed

programme.title: Pain & Gain (2013)
programme.desc: Three bodybuilders make a disastrous attempt to get rich by kidnapping a wealthy businessman who goes to their gym and forcing him to sign over his fortune to them. The plan goes awry when the hostage escapes and hires a relentless private detective to track them down. Fact-based action comedy, with Mark Wahlberg, Dwayne Johnson and Anthony Mackie

programme.title: Brother (2000)
programme.desc: A Japanese gangster exiled to America forms an unholy alliance with his drug-dealing half brother, and the pair embark on a battle for LA's prime drug turf. Crime thriller, directed by and starring Takeshi Kitano, with Omar Epps and Claude Maki

programme.title: Winchester '73 (1950)
programme.desc: A gunslinger tracks down his father's killer, but is unable to exact his revenge because the sheriff of the town makes a point of confiscating all firearms. Instead he challenges him to compete in a shooting competition to win a superb rifle, but when the murderer loses, he steals the coveted prize. Western, starring James Stewart, Shelley Winters, Dan Duryea and Stephen McNally

programme.title: The Sound of Fury (1950)
programme.desc: A criminal recruits a hard-up family man as his accomplice in a kidnapping. But when they murder the hostage, they find themselves at the mercy of revenge-seeking mob, whose anger is stoked by the press stories of a crusading reporter determined the pair will pay the ultimate price for their crime. Depression-era drama, starring Frank Lovejoy, Lloyd Bridges, Kathleen Ryan and Richard Carlson

programme.title: The Last Blitzkrieg (1959)
programme.desc: The son of a Nazi general is selected for a secret undercover mission. He and his men disguise themselves as American soldiers and go behind the Allied lines, with the intention of carrying out acts of sabotage and undermining enemy morale. Second World War drama, starring Van Johnson and Kerwin Mathews

programme.title: The Odessa File (1974)
programme.desc: The detailed diaries of a former inmate of a concentration camp fall into the hands of an investigative journalist. Incensed by what he reads, he embarks on a crusade to discover the prison commandant's new identity and expose his crimes to the world. In the process, the trail leads him to a secret organisation that helped Nazi SS officers escape justice. Thriller, based on Frederick Forsyth's novel, starring Jon Voight, Derek Jacobi and siblings Maria and Maximilian Schell

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee (1986)
programme.desc: A New York reporter searches the Australian Outback for a maverick hunter with a legendary reputation, and invites the adventurer back to America. But the die-hard Aussie needs to draw on all his survival skills to adjust to life in the urban jungle. Comedy adventure, written by and starring Paul Hogan, with Linda Kozlowski, John Meillon and Mark Blum

programme.title: X-Men: Apocalypse (2016)
programme.desc: The mutant heroes face the oldest and most powerful of their kind, an ancient Egyptian tyrant who is restored to life in the 1980s and plans to destroy civilisation and rebuild it in his own image. Superhero adventure sequel, starring James McAvoy, Michael Fassbender, Jennifer Lawrence and Oscar Isaac

programme.title: Brotherhood (2016)
programme.desc: Sam Peel is now married to lawyer Kayla, with whom he's raising two children, and is determined to stay out of trouble, but he is blackmailed into returning to the criminal underworld. Drama sequel concluding the Hood trilogy, written, directed by and starring Noel Clarke

programme.title: Ouija (2014)
programme.desc: A teenager recovering from the suicide of a friend persuades a group of her classmates to join her in attempting to make contact with the dead girl's spirit. They discover that she was driven to her death by dangerous supernatural forces, which they have unwittingly unleashed to prey on them. Horror, starring Olivia Cooke and Ana Coto

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. Warren is suspicious of Sienna and Brody, while Maxine encourages Damon to follow his heart, and Kurt makes his intentions very clear with a proposition for his friends

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of exercise and pets

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California. The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef again comes to the aid of failing American restaurants, starting in Fishtown, Philadelphia, where he tries to help the three owners of the Hot Potato Cafe, which has not made a profit in two years. Spurred on by a scathing review by an influential critic, he makes radical changes to alter the staff's attitudes and create food that is up to his own exacting standards

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Mother's boy Tiago plans to put his self-conscious bride Karlette on the big screen at his 1950s drive-in wedding. However, his attention-shunning fiancee wants her wedding day to be something intimate and contemporary

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As spring break arrives, Barry talks Erica, Ren and the JTP into an ill-advised discount vacation. Beverly struggles when Adam considers taking time off after high school

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray's business rival makes him an offer he cannot refuse, and Adam and Erica offer Ms Cinoman the chance to perform their original stage show

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Ren decides to host an Earth Day telethon, Barry vows to help her book some A-list talent. Beverly and her nemesis square off to find a perfect match for Bill

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As things get more serious between Adam and Brea, Beverly struggles to let go. Barry is thrown for a loop when Lainey Lewis comes back to town for a visit

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: With prom night approaching, Adam worries that Brea will ditch him for a more popular guy. Erica struggles with how to support Geoff when he receives bad news

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is given the chance to square off against the one actor from the Star Trek franchise he holds a grudge against - Wil Wheaton. Meanwhile, Leonard asks Penny to set Howard up on a date with one of her friends. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard worries his lack of American football knowledge is alienating him from Penny and her friends. However, he finds an unlikely sporting tutor in the form of Sheldon, who reluctantly spent most of his childhood attending games with his father. Meanwhile, Raj is infuriated when Howard abandons him to pursue a girl at a kite-fighting contest

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A jealous Leonard argues with Penny when she invites one of her male friends to stay at her apartment while he is in town. Unfortunately, the row brings up unpleasant memories for Sheldon of watching his warring parents, causing even more tension between the friends. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard go camping to watch the Leonid meteor shower, but the trip takes an unexpected turn thanks to some specially baked cookies. Meanwhile, Penny injures herself in the shower, and with the rest of the gang out of town, it's left to Sheldon to come to her aid

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard's fear of commitment causes him to avoid Bernadette, but he soon realises he has made a mistake and tries to compensate for it. Meanwhile, Kripke plays a prank during a radio interview with Sheldon, who sets out to get revenge, only to be caught by the Dean. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with an appearance by Katee Sackhoff (Battlestar Galactica) as herself

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette asks Leonard about his physics experiment, making Howard so jealous that she threatens to end their relationship. Penny also feels put out by the situation, and asks Sheldon to teach her about science. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard's mother visits and he is horrified to learn that Sheldon knows more than he does about his own family, including his parents' impending divorce and the death of his dog. Guest starring Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj lusts after a girl he and Sheldon meet at a university party, and Leonard comes to regret airing his disapproval of Penny's belief in psychics. Comedy, starring Kunal Nayyar and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon's flat is burgled, so they work on a state-of-the-art security system in a bid to outwit any future would-be thieves. However, their plans go awry when they ensnare Penny in a net. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The quest to take ownership of presenter Greg Davies' golden head continues, under the beady eye of 'little' Alex Horne. Mawaan Rizwan attempts an upside-down farm-related illusion, Daisy May Cooper softens some pasta and Katherine Parkinson lays waste to a garden arch. With Johnny Vegas and Richard Herring

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie (2007)
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly pollutes Lake Springfield, so the US government decides to isolate the city underneath a giant dome. The Simpsons manage to escape and plan to start a new life in Alaska - but learn Springfield is about to be destroyed, and return to save their friends. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta, Julie Kavner, Nancy Cartwright and Yeardley Smith

programme.title: Spy (2015)
programme.desc: A deskbound CIA agent provides valuable background support for a dashing secret agent, but has never gone into action herself. Everything changes, when the spy mysteriously vanishes, and she leaps into action to take his place, infiltrating the inner circle of a ruthless arms dealer and trying to avert a global catastrophe. Comedy adventure, starring Melissa McCarthy, Jason Statham and Rose Byrne

programme.title: Gogglebox

Narrated by Craig Cash. First shown in April 2019

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Rick, still in galactic prison, puts an intricate escape plan into action. Back on Earth - now under Federation control - Morty and Summer have an argument about their grandfather that gets out of control

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: Drusilla turns the resurrected Darla back into one of the undead, and they embark on a murderous rampage across the city. As Angel races against time to put a stop to their dastardly activities, he fails to notice his single-minded determination is leading to conflict with those closest to him. Guest starring Juliet Landau

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Dina, 39, is keen to settle down and start a family, but her date, 41-year-old Stephen, is a born adventurer who has climbed the Matterhorn and swum oceans. Will he run a mile when she shares her intentions with him? Margaret, 73, hasn't been on a date for 44 years and is looking for a family man who shares her love of music and life, while art student Rachel, meets vegan singer-songwriter and self-confessed hippie Hari

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Programmes including Sex Tape, Britain's Got Talent, Line of Duty, This Morning, The All New Monty: Who Bares Wins, The Yorkshire Vet and the News are subjected to scrutiny, as the armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week. Narrated by Craig Cash. First shown in May 2019

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends set up camp outside a cinema to get tickets for a new cut of Raiders of the Lost Ark - but find themselves resuming hostilities with Sheldon's old foe Wil Wheaton, the former Star Trek: The Next Generation actor. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette invite Amy to a sleepover

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's father pays a visit and Leonard discovers she told her parents they were back together, so he plays his boyfriend role to the hilt - much to her dismay. Meanwhile, Raj gets drunk and makes a pass at Howard's girlfriend Bernadette. Guest starring Keith Carradine

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Lily is reunited with her father at Thanksgiving, and explains the real reason why they stopped speaking three years earlier - but disagrees with Marshall on the best way to heal the rift. American sitcom, starring Alyson Hannigan and Jason Segel

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted's friends do more harm than good when they try to help him impress a woman from his college days. Marshall makes an effort to rectify his life choices after finding a letter he wrote as a teenager detailing what he hoped to achieve as an adult - prompting Lily to point out the positive side of his working life

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George meets a primary school teacher in Southend hoping to build a classroom inside a salvaged plane, and in Devon he finds out about a cricket-mad couple's plans to turn an old scorebox into a garden hangout. He also continues his tour of small structures in New Zealand, seeing a steel treehouse complete with automatic beer dispenser built into the sofa

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets Ian and Becky from Lincolnshire, who are embarking on the restoration of a rare VW Phoenix campervan. But this couple are not doing things by halves, having decided to add a sound-activated dance floor to the vehicle. He also visits Stirlingshire, where a small family business plans to convert a Sea King helicopter into luxury overnight accommodation, and travels to an ordinary residential street on the outskirts of Auckland, New Zealand, to see a dome home that is out of this world. Plus, George and Will design a front door for their rotating house

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George travels to Portland in Dorset where a couple are building a shipwreck-themed garden room with unrestricted views over Chesil Beach. In south London, he meets a woman converting a 1980s campervan into a mobile canine holiday home, and in New Zealand he travels to a remote lodge made almost entirely of glass. He also looks for inspiration on how to put a garden inside his rotating home

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first of a week of dinner parties in Devon is hosted by community nurse Tina, who hopes to impress her guests with a menu incorporating all of her favourite dishes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Devon, Essex native Rob is pinning his hopes on an Italian-themed menu - and some artful entertainment - to land him the £1,000 prize money

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Pilot Rhys hosts the latest dinner party in Devon, but one of the guests is thrown out of an imaginary lifeboat and an interesting find leads to Rhys being mistaken for a stripper

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: HR manager Holly serves up restaurant favourites in Devon, but her guests are put out when she sets rules over the use of the toilet - and a portrait leaves the men open-mouthed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Devon, detective Steve is counting on a menu of bold and experimental flavours to win him the £1,000 prize. His feast of bold flavours goes down a storm with most of the guests, but also sparks a Pavlova row between Tina and Holly

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Rooms 36 in the Lake District, owned by health-conscious Andy Peters, who is joined by his friend, fellow B&B owner Jeronime Palmer

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mother and son team Trish and Connor Richardson host at the Red Lion Coaching Inn in Redbourne, Lincolnshire, where Julie and James are not impressed by the dated bathrooms

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Julie and James host at the Schiehallion Hotel in Aberfeldy, Perth and Kinross, where the guests are impressed by their rooms, but once again luxury lovers Andy and Jeronime want more from their beds

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit of the week is to Townhead Hotel in Lockerbie, Dumfries and Galloway, owned by Stephen Montgomery, where the high level of finish in the rooms surprises all of the guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Andy and Jeronime from Rooms 36 want to find out why their luxury B&B didn't hit the mark as the B&B owners meet for the last time to settle some scores

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Kevin hosts the first of a week of dinner parties in and around Swansea, hoping to win his guests over with an evening inspired by his favourite holiday destination of Benidorm

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This week's competition is in and around Swansea, where second host, café bar owner Tino, is hoping to wow her guests with an African banquet inspired by her homeland of Zimbabwe

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: For the third visit of the week in Swansea, beautician Natalie hopes to impress her guests with a George Michael-themed evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bodybuilder Rob hopes his Thai-themed menu will impress the guests in Swansea, but his starter lacks a vital component and his main is incredibly similar to the previous course

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Swansea, GP and keen tennis player Janine hopes to serve up an ace with a tennis-themed evening. The night kicks off with everyone dressed up for Centre Court - and bodybuilder Rob turning up in a mini skirt. Benidorm-loving DJ Kev is overcome with emotion as he tells the gang that this is the best week of his life, while cafe bar owner Tino decides to pick fault with Janine's dishes instead

programme.title: Autumn at Jimmy's Farm
programme.desc: Following life on Jimmy Doherty's farm during the autumn months, as the team prepare the farm and wildlife park for the incoming seasonal changes. This time, the wildlife park takes delivery of their brand-new insectivore, an anteater, and with mating season beginning, Nero the stud ram is introduced to his ewes. Elsewhere, Jimmy gets to grips with this autumn's piglets

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: Inverness Search and Rescue race to help two crewmen who are seriously injured after their vessel is hit by a freak wave in the North Sea. In the Lakes, Patterdale Mountain Rescue team rush to assist Alex, who has a suspected femur fracture. And nine-year-old Pippa needs airlifting from the Isles of Scilly to a mainland hospital to treat her appendicitis

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The documentary follows paramedics as they deal with people who have mental health problems. Maria Stanley is called to a multi-storey car park, where she tries to talk a man away from the edge, while Kirsten Harper and Amy Siddall race to help a father who is having suicidal thoughts. In London, crews attend the scene of a failed suicide attempt that has left a middle-aged man trapped under a train

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The air ambulance is dispatched to collect Frances, an 80-year-old woman who fell three metres into her empty swimming pool while gardening, and has sustained a head wound that could have resulted in a life-altering bleed on the brain. Ruth, aged 86, arrives at St George's A&E with her heart beating three times faster than the normal rate. Doctors are concerned it may not be pumping enough blood around her body, and quickly prescribe fast-acting medication. Plus, students Jerry and Sakille turn up at the hospital after Jerry crashed her car on the way home from a party. While Jerry stayed sober to serve as the designated driver, she concludes that balancing a full-time job with her studies and a hectic social life might not be a sensible idea

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Southbridge, Massachusetts, where he checks into the Vienna Inn, an Austrian-themed hotels and restaurant. Owners Jonathan and Lisa Krach have seen their cluttered inn acquire a negative reputation among the locals, and as a result, business isn't what it used to be. Can Gordon turn things round and keep the doors to this historic hotel open?

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: Inverness Search and Rescue race to help two crewmen who are seriously injured after their vessel is hit by a freak wave in the North Sea. In the Lakes, Patterdale Mountain Rescue team rush to assist Alex, who has a suspected femur fracture. And nine-year-old Pippa needs airlifting from the Isles of Scilly to a mainland hospital to treat her appendicitis

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A one-year-old St Bernard suffering with hip dysplasia is brought to the clinic by the Warden family. Having recently lost the the dog's brother to a similar illness, emotions are running high. Meanwhile, Noel treats a 13-year-old collie that has been hit by a car, and tries to devise a new bionic paw for a cat with a badly deformed hind foot

programme.title: Father Ted

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jo and Darrell from south-west London are looking for a holiday home on the Balearic Island of Menorca to enjoy with their two young children and Darrell's grown-up son. They run their own busy human resources company together so cannot wait to find a bolthole to relax in and have some quality time as a family. With a budget of £300,000 Danni Menzies is on hand to show them five properties around the south of the island

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien assess sewing machines in Kent as they continue their journey across the UK to find unique and valuable items 'lost' in people's homes

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole tries to restore a monkey bike, and Simon O'Brien makes use of all his skills as he tries to give new life to an old racing bicycle

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Before winter arrives, Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree take on their next project, transforming a 35-foot long, eight-ton river boat into luxury guest accommodation. While Angel completely overhauls the old nautical interior with bespoke fabrics and unique crafts, Dick has the small task of installing the boat's very own wind turbine and a decking that reaches over the moat

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Juana and Trevor Jones, who plan to knock down some 300-year-old decrepit barns, and build themselves a stylish retirement home in the Lincolnshire countryside. While sceptical about their ability to do this on a £100,000 budget, Charlie soon realises goung over-budget may be the least of the couple's problems. Ex-builder Trevor is determined to be hands-on with the project, and even refuses to down tools when he is facing a life-saving operation

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the Bell House Hotel in Wiltshire, where business partners Chris Williams and Jacqui Hogg hope guests will appreciate their attempts to bring London chic to the shires. Susan and David Speak are frustrated by the low shower pressure, while Jade Hendon butts heads with Matthew over healthy eating at dinner and the hosts' absence at breakfast the next morning gets the criticism flowing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the Partridge in Oxfordshire, where young couple Matthew Cockman and Paula Szkwarkowska hope guests will get on board with their passion for local organic food. A communal bathroom has the guests lost for words, and the lack of a hot breakfast included in the price leaves a bad taste in everyone's mouths

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Strawberry Gardens B&B in Heysham for the third day of the contest, where husband and wife team Susan and David Speak offer home-from-home accommodation and an abundance of northern hospitality. Sports enthusiast David treats his guests to a traditional darts competition, adjudicated by former world champion Alan Warriner-Little, but he is unimpressed when Paula sends back her evening meal. However, it is Chris and Jacqui's feedback that disappoints the hosts the most

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Bateman's Mill near Chesterfield, where manager Jade Hendon has high hopes of being the best. But she faces an uphill battle when David and Susan go out of their way to find hairs in the bathroom - and to make mattters worse, her Derbyshire breakfast is not a hit with Chris and Jacqui

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hoteliers get together one last time to confront their rivals, defend any criticism and find out what they have been paid. However, things get particularly heated when it's time to count up the cash

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: It's mating season for Chester Zoo's onagers and after two years living alone, male Holmes is released into the female paddock, where he chases down every female in sight. Galapagos tortoise Charlie is losing weight and keepers believe that it's down to bullying from her older sister, so they decide to step in with an innovative system to try and alleviate the problem

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree help British people making French castles their home or running businesses from them. In the opening episode, the duo give Johnny a crash course in the dos and don'ts of chateau shopping before he and his wife start the search for their own dream place. Jonathan and Michael, who are struggling to turn their magnificent French castle into a money-making venture, explore some of their chateau's caves in the hope of finding a buried fortune. Plus, Phil and Angelina struggle to pitch their chateau as the perfect place for a 50th wedding anniversary party when they can't see eye to eye themselves

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Peter Maddison meets Doug and Yvette, who have lived in a shed on their 10-acre property on the Gold Coast for two years, having planned to build a house from scratch

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Architect Martin Pease plans an unusual home for his family where everything is white and open plan. He calls upon his experience of designing commercial buildings to build the house and uses materials and systems more commonly used in office projects. The biggest risk is that his house may look more like a car showroom than a comfortable retreat

programme.title: Inside the Spitfire Factory
programme.desc: After two years of hard work, the Greek Spitfire is nearly complete - but will she fly? It's all hands on deck with the added pressure of both the owners and veteran George Dunn wanting to see their Spitfire fly again. Emotions run high as they prepare for the maiden flight

programme.title: Secrets of the Superfactories
programme.desc: A look at the inner workings of UPS's delivery service, Brompton's folding bikes, Rold's locking washing machines and Nongshim's instant noodles

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: The Supervet

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the luxury Halliwell House in Cheshire for the third day of the contest, where owners Martin Hulme and Sara Williams charge nearly £500 per night. Donna is astonished at the room rates, while David and Ewa are expecting nothing but perfection, but the self-service approach at breakfast confuses the guests, leaving Martin and Sara defiant in the face of their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final two days see the contestants staying the night at Soar Chapel Guest House in Ebbw Vale, the family home of mum and daughter Lesley and Chloe Priestly. Expectations are high for this duo and one guest in particular is not disappointed. Things get going in the afternoon during a beatboxing contest, although old tensions resurface at dinner and the hosts are left to calm things down. A massive spread is laid on at breakfast, but when one guest takes issue with the cooked items, Lesley and Chloe worry what impact it will have come payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. David and Ewa Woodward want to challenge Martin's criticism over the way they run their business. Next, Donna Taylor wants to find out more about the issue that caused Martin and Sara to lose sleep. Needless to say, there is tension in the air and axes to grind, before the winner is revealed

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: The zebras have a newcomer to their herd, Okoth, who starts to make a play for power, which does not go down well with zebra Florence. Meanwhile, Keeper Isolde comes up with an unusual plan to give the zoo's three Komodo dragon sisters some much needed space from each other, and Chester's male lemurs are in for a shock with a female on her way to share their island

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Angel Adoree advises Jonathan and Michael on how to make their chateau wedding business work. Then it's crunch time for the pair as they try to persuade an American couple to book a big-money wedding with them. Meanwhile, Phil and Angelina clear their garden for a wedding anniversary party, but struggle to dispose of the debris. Elsewhere, Johnny and Ashley view two properties as they search for a dream chateau

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Peter Maddison meets a man who plans to build a large, spotted gum-clad home on French Island in Victoria - a low-key National Park island that houses more koalas than people

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Jo and Shaun Bennett, a couple with a love of gothic architecture and horror movies, plan to use their budget of £400,000 to build an Addams Family-style house, complete with a stained-glass window, a stone fireplace and an oak staircase featuring gargoyles. However, completing the five-bedroom home on limited funds proves difficult

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside an A&E department, focusing on patients and their families, as well as the work of the staff dealing with the emergencies. This episode follows the stories of three patients and how they cope when life takes an unexpected turn, including a patient who severed three of his fingers with an electric saw. Elsewhere, a man with motor neurone disease is rushed to St George's with severe sepsis, and a teenager struggles to come to terms with the impact of serious injuries he sustained in a car crash six weeks ago

programme.title: Shut-Ins: Britain's Fattest People
programme.desc: The documentary series follows 24-year-old single mother Emily, who has lost control of her eating habits, causing her to reach a worrying 26 stone. Emily puts herself in the hands of a leading bariatric surgeon, but also seeks the services of a behavioural psychologist in a bid to understand what is driving her compulsive behaviour

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jon Richardson and Sean Lock face off once again in another unpredictable battle of words and numbers, with help from Kevin Bridges and Rebecca Front. Rachel Riley is on maths-and-letters duty, and Joe Lycett is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Harpers Ferry in West Virginia, where he tries to save the Town's Inn, a historic hotel run by retired teacher and junk hoarder Karan Townsend. She has accumulated so many useless belongings that there is hardly any room to accommodate guests. Can Gordon convince her to get rid of her clutter or will the hotel continue to go down the pan?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside an A&E department, focusing on patients and their families, as well as the work of the staff dealing with the emergencies. This episode follows the stories of three patients and how they cope when life takes an unexpected turn, including a patient who severed three of his fingers with an electric saw. Elsewhere, a man with motor neurone disease is rushed to St George's with severe sepsis, and a teenager struggles to come to terms with the impact of serious injuries he sustained in a car crash six weeks ago

programme.title: Secret History
programme.desc: A look at the relics found in the tombs of China's Han Dynasty. The era is generally considered the golden age of ancient China, rivalling the Roman empire for international power, and has been a defining influence on the country's cultural identity ever since. The programme examines how the emperors arranged to have their dead bodies mummified in the search for immortality and looks at a newly discovered version of the famous terracotta army

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates shock reports that changing sea temperatures mean squid and chips could one day replace fish and chips as the national dish. Kate Quilton looks into where multivitamins come from and how much we need them, while Matt Tebbutt visits the UK's leading clotted cream producer in Cornwall and an astonishing algae farm in the desert in Israel

programme.desc: An obnoxious TV weatherman reporting on a small town's annual festival finds himself caught in a bizarre time loop, and is forced to relive the same day over and over again. While at first he tries to exploit his predicament, he is ultimately driven to mend his ways and adopt a less cynical attitude. Comedy, starring Bill Murray, Andie MacDowell, Chris Elliott and Stephen Tobolowsky

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Eddie Hall, winner of the 2017 World's Strongest Man contest, tours the USA on a quest to conquer the biggest and best eye-watering food and physical challenges. Eddie lands in Florida Keys to attempt a conch-fritter eating record, do some serious big-game fishing and try what's billed as the best Key Lime Pie on earth

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Eddie Hall squares up to the Mac & Cheese Challenge at Brooklyn's Mac Shack - which weighs in at more than two kilograms and nearly 7,000 calories of pasta, cheese and sauce

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Actor and comedian Johnny Vegas accompanies Richard Ayoade on a brief jaunt to the United Arab Emirates and the oil-rich city of Dubai. Richard checks into a suite boasting five balconies at the Atlantis Hotel, on the world's largest man-made island. The luxury continues with a city tour by seaplane and a taste of the world's most expensive ice-cream. The pair enter the biggest shopping centre in the world, where they enjoy a camel sandwich and a camelccino, and visit the observation deck of the world's tallest building, the Burj Khalifa

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade takes comedian Roisin Conaty to Berlin for a two-day cultural break. The duo check-in at the vibrant nhow music hotel, which boasts two in-house recording studios with instruments available on room service. The mini-breakers sign-up for a guided city tour in an old East German Trabant car, finishing at Checkpoint Charlie. They also step inside a replica Cold War apartment, and visit a beer garden in the city's most popular park

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Guests Johnny Vegas, Ronni Ancona and Jimmy Carr join regular panellist Alan Davies and host Sandi Toksvig to contemplate the theme 'naval navigation' in this extended episode. programme.desc: Mike and Frank go on the road in search for a unique motorbike, only to receive some shocking news from an appraiser

programme.title: Modern Wheels or Classic Steals
programme.desc: Rebecca Jackson and Elo help car buyers choose their next vehicles. In the first episode, Kerri has to decide between a Porsche and a Karmann Ghia

programme.title: Modern Wheels or Classic Steals
programme.desc: A former British Championship racer wants to swap his Ford Focus for a two-door sports car, and is pitched options including a Ford Mustang Coupe and a Lotus Elise

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May put three supercars through their paces in Italy. Their weapons of choice are the 691bhp Lamborghini Aventador, McLaren's hi-tech MP4-12C, and a British brute in the form of the Noble M600. The journey begins at Nardo, a high-speed testing ground so vast it can be seen from space, and includes a nerve-racking drive in Rome before reaching its conclusion with a timed challenge against the Stig at the Imola circuit

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May travel to Beijing to learn about China's car industry, which has seen great expansion in recent years - but also have a violent encounter with one of the Stig's cousins. Meanwhile, Richard Hammond immerses himself in the world of Nascar at a race in Texas, and the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG Roadster is wrestled around the test track, emitting serious amounts of noise and smoke in the process. Future host Matt LeBlanc is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein's French Odyssey
programme.desc: The connoisseur of local food takes a gastronomic tour along the canal systems of southern France, from Bordeaux to Marseille. He samples seafood and regional cuisine, as well as exploring a variety of traditional recipes, including artichoke salad with poached egg, eels in cider, and bass with beurre blanc

programme.title: Rick Stein's French Odyssey
programme.desc: The connoisseur of local food explores the banks of the River Garonne on board a 100-year-old converted barge, and savours the delights of French provincial cooking including magret de canard and petit sale. Other dishes featured are clams in white garlic sauce, eels in parsley and garlic butter, and steak tartare

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and Richard Hammond take charge of shooting a car chase for a film version of The Sweeney, assisting with the stunt-driving choreography and the direction of lead actors Ray Winstone and Ben Drew. James May takes the Vauxhall Corsa VXR Nurburgring for a run around the test track, and delivers his verdict on the updated Fiat Panda. Hollywood actor Ryan Reynolds is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May work on a project to build mobility scooters capable of tackling the British countryside's terrain. Ferrari's four-wheel-drive FF is pitted against the revised, V8-engined Bentley Continental GT on a test track at the edge of the Arctic Circle, while James puts the Fisker Karma through its paces in Florida, and meets AC/DC frontman Brian Johnson

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: On the latest leg of his road trip, Zuu ventures into the unknown - travelling from his native West London, all the way to Hackney in East London to cook for comedian Jamali Maddix

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade goes hurtling through a ruthlessly efficient mini-break in Paris with presenter and comedian Mel Giedroyc. Their base is a chic hotel famed for being the place where Oscar Wilde died, but there's no time to hang about soaking up the literary atmosphere, as they head to the Montparnasse Tower for arguably the best view of Paris, and one which has the bonus of including the Eiffel Tower. There's also calf's head casserole and snails, a scooter tour, 'green fairy' absinthe, a Cordon Bleu cookery school, bespoke perfume and an art tour

programme.desc: A secret weapons program in the heart of Austria that could have ended badly for the Allies - and may have indicated nuclear plans being concocted by Hitler

programme.title: Inside Hitler's Killing Machine

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The world's most impressive disused railway bridges, including the biggest wooden trestle bridge in the world, which was closed down due to hurricane damage

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring ship graveyards, including Scapa Flow in Orkney, where German warships were scuttled after the First World War, and Mallows Bay, home to 200 wrecks colonised by wildlife

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: How Europe's most advanced power station became a film set. Plus, the structures made by scientific pioneer Nikola Tesla in his quest to provide the US with free electricity

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The stories behind closed roads, including a route once used by the French Resistance and areas made impassable by crumbling hills and sand dunes

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A fuel plant in Poland built to make Nazi Germany self-sufficient by using the latest technology of the time to turn coal into oil

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Rene and the resistance attempt to smuggle the airmen back to England inside empty landmines, but Herr Flick and Von Smallhausen hide in the mines awaiting resistance members

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Rene and Yvette elope by rail to Switzerland with four of General Von Klinkerhoffen's gold bars, but find they have company. To make matters worse, the Resistance is planning to blow up the train. Comedy, starring Gorden Kaye

programme.desc: Rene is on the night train to Geneva, and while he is seeking to avoid Edith, he bumps into Mimi, the Colonel and Gruber. Second World War comedy, starring Gorden Kaye, Carmen Silvera and Vicki Michelle

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Did the ancients possess the knowledge and ability to create, and cut seemingly complex crystal skulls or do they have extra-terrestrial origins?

programme.desc: A 1971 Mercedes SL and a 1989 Jaguar XJS emerge from a barn on a chicken farm, a Roller and a Rover go under the hammer and a 1966 Triumph Spitfire is restored to near perfection

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The story behind the Krupp company, who were responsible for the manufacture of two of Germany's most feared war products - the Panzer Tank and the U-boat

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough encounters two species with wrinkly skin, where nature has tinkered with the ageing process to different effect. The mole rat retains its looks while growing old and the elephant looks old from birth, yet both creatures live relatively long lives

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Paul Hollywood delves into his family history, finding out about his maternal grandfather's experiences in the Second World War, serving as an anti-aircraft gunner in Tunisia and Italy. The Great British Bake Off judge then digs deeper, learning about his Scottish ancestry - and how one of his forebears held down a very demanding job

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: British-born actress Jane Seymour knows there is Jewish ancestry on her father's side of the family, but beyond that she knows very little, other than her own suspicions that they suffered in the Holocaust. As she researches her paternal great-aunts Jadwiga and Michaela, she soon finds out more about their experiences under Nazi occupation. The search takes her to Warsaw and France, uncovering stories of life in a ghetto and a terrifying flight to Switzerland from the Germans

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The life of Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity, having witnessed Jesus' death and resurrection

programme.title: Inside Hitler's Killing Machine
programme.desc: The story of the Ahnenerbe research institute, which was set up to provide scientific backing to Hitler's ideology, through a series of horrific experiments

programme.title: The Day They Dropped the Bomb
programme.desc: Documentary marking the 70th anniversary of the day the world's first atomic bomb was detonated above the Japanese city of Hiroshima on August 6, 1945. Featuring a minute-by-minute account of what happened on that tragic day, through archive footage and interviews with eyewitnesses who rarely speak about their experience of the bombing. Also interviewed is navigator Theodore Van Kirk, who was the last surviving member of the crew who dropped the bomb, before his death in 2014

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A village ruin that is now pitted and scarred, a ghostly fleet of ships, a bridge to nowhere hidden in a forest and strange metal structures in a wood

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Series exploring ruined engineering projects that have been put to alternative use, including the site of the Chernobyl disaster and a Nazi holiday complex

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the second visit in this series to Plas Newydd on the Isle of Anglesey. The team examine rarities including a cabinet with a secret function, a magazine rack made by celebrated designer Piero Fornasetti, a collection of historical items related to deafness, a Chinese silver punchbowl and a photo that has a connection to the Apollo 11 mission

programme.title: Steam Train Britain
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of three preserved steam railway lines - the South Devon Railway heritage line, the Ffestiniog and Welsh Highlands Railway and the Great Central Railway. Sports scientist Megan Smith has a dream of tending the fire of a steam locomotive on the Ffestiniog & Welsh Highland Railway, and she stokes the bolier of NG143 and sets off along the 25 miles from Caernarfon to Porthmadog

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The incredible efforts to ensure that the hastily constructed temporary fix around the damaged reactor at Chernobyl becomes a permanent solution, known as the New Safe Confinement

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An eerie, empty country village which hides a sad secret, a mysterious tower battered by the elements and a disused railway deep beneath the streets of a city

programme.title: Narrow Escapes of World War Two
programme.desc: Documentary explaining how a squadron of low-flying bombers freed resistance fighters from Amiens Jail during the Second World War

programme.title: Inside Hitler's Killing Machine
programme.desc: The establishment of the concentration camps, revealing how quickly a system of concentration populations turned into a tool for mass murder

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels between Liverpool and Wales. Along the way he discovers a childhood favourite - a miniature tank engine with three carriages in dark red - made by Frank Hornby, and learns the story of a Welsh countess who lived in Gwrych Castle. In Snowdonia, he also rides the waves with a Welsh surfing champion

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: In picturesque Snowdonia, Michael Portillo braves the fastest zip line in the world - stretching 1,500 feet across a vast slate quarry as he begins the last leg of his journey to Caernarfon. En route, he also visits the home of British mountaineering, Pen y Gwryd, to hear how an Edwardian journalist and poet created a climbing community, which grew to include men who would conquer Everest in the 1950s

programme.title: Inside Central Station

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: British-born actress Jane Seymour knows there is Jewish ancestry on her father's side of the family, but beyond that she knows very little, other than her own suspicions that they suffered in the Holocaust. As she researches her paternal great-aunts Jadwiga and Michaela, she soon finds out more about their experiences under Nazi occupation. The search takes her to Warsaw and France, uncovering stories of life in a ghetto and a terrifying flight to Switzerland from the Germans

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
