Tom Allen puts a select group of home bakers through their paces from a safe distance, and Jo showcases more of the weird and wonderful delights from viewers' kitchens

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Interior designer James hosts the first of a week of dinner parties from Edinburgh, hoping to impress guests Aisling, Bruce and Katy with a spicy Mexican menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second host in Edinburgh is 69-year-old grandmother Katy, who is hoping that her out-of-season Xmas Tartan-themed evening will put her guests in a yuletide mood

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Glamorous solicitor Aisling hosts the third dinner party in Edinburgh and throws a traditional Irish party, with a piper at the door to welcome her guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: American writer Harry serves up a menu inspired by family on day four in Edinburgh - but the evening starts with a bang and does not get any less surreal thanks to Katy's stories

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: t's the final night in Edinburgh, hosted by food and fashion-conscious Bruce. All week Bruce has expressed his desire for the finer things in life and his dislike of anything that falls below his high standards, so expectations are high. Can Bruce pull the evening off with style, and will he do enough to grab the cash?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Marianne and Anthony from West Yorkshire search for their perfect holiday home in the Axarquia region of southern Spain

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Reg and Aby Solomon from Hertfordshire look to buy a family holiday home near the Spanish town of Denia on the popular Costa Blanca. Laura Hamilton searches every nook and cranny of the local market in an attempt to find properties that match the couple's £200,000 budget, but it remains to be seen whether she can deliver the perfect place in the perfect location

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at My Way Guest House in Broompark, Co Durham, where Kaye Horner and her daughter Lily are counting on their cleanliness to gain top marks

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway
programme.desc: Budding interior designer Cora and builder Jonny buy a house in the Lancashire town of Kirkham at auction and then have six months to renovate it before trying to sell it for a profit. Simon O'Brien presents

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is sneezed upon at the airport and convinces himself he has caught something serious, so the long-suffering Debra is lumbered with looking after him. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray buys Debra an expensive Christmas present in the hope she will be grateful enough to let him go on a weekend golf trip with friends, but has not anticipated that she is getting him an even more extravagant gift. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Brooklyn, New York, to tackle a 55-year-old family business. Owner John Esposito left school at the age of 14 and has worked at his parents' restaurant, Sal's Pizzeria, ever since. Their success meant they could afford to purchase the location next door in the 1990s, naming it Mama Maria after John's mother, who died in 2002. But when he lost his father as well, John became overwhelmed by the responsibility of running both establishments and his livelihood is at risk

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for West Babylon, New York, to help the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts. The chef struggles to cope with disorganised staff and an unappealing menu, but quickly realises the real problem lies in the kitchen, where a lack of leadership and communication is causing serious trouble

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman and Laura Hamilton help a couple to choose between a property on the western coastline of Wales and a home in Carcassonne in the south of France

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Sonal and Tina can't wait to give up their busy lives in Birmingham and move to the seaside. Looking for a new permanent home on the stunning Gower Peninsula in Wales and also a holiday bolt-hole on the Greek island of Corfu, they call upon the joint talents of Jonnie Irwin and Laura Hamilton to deliver the double dream. Rising to the challenge, with £385,000 to play with, Jonnie has three great properties to show them in the UK, and for her £150,000 budget Laura has three options up her sleeve in Corfu, but will the couple love any of them enough to put in an offer?

programme.title: Autumn at Jimmy's Farm
programme.desc: Following life on Jimmy Doherty's farm during the autumn months, as the team prepare the farm and wildlife park for the incoming seasonal changes. This time, the wildlife park takes delivery of their brand-new insectivore, an anteater, and with mating season beginning, Nero the stud ram is introduced to his ewes. Elsewhere, Jimmy gets to grips with this autumn's piglets

programme.title: Blockers (2018)
programme.desc: Julie, Kayla and Sam are high school seniors who make a pact to lose their virginity on prom night. Lisa, Mitchell and Hunter are the overprotective parents who try to stop the girls from sealing the deal, no matter what the cost. Comedy, starring Leslie Mann, John Cena and Ike Barinholtz

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A look back at a host of classic dates from the show, where eyes met, sparks flew, and love truly blossomed. Dapper gent Will is set up on a date with fellow tweed admirer Fran, while Bristol Rastafarian and single mother Ibiba meets fellow Bristolian Aarron. Elsewhere, Octogenarian Doreen meets 86-year-old author James, who is more than ready to write the next chapter of his love life

programme.title: The Bridge
programme.desc: There is nasty shock as the group members wake up to discover that former team-mate Luke has sabotaged their progress in exchange for £10,000 from the prize fund. Zac finds it hard to believe that his best friend would do such a thing and considers throwing in the towel, while newly elected leader Rowan is in the firing line. In the most testing of final days, can the team pull together, rebuild the bridge and reach the money?

programme.title: Deliveroo: Secrets of Your Takeaway
programme.desc: The behind-the-scenes story of how Britain's fastest-growing food delivery company has revolutionised the takeaway industry and how they, and their restaurant partners, are navigating the storm of the coronavirus pandemic. Cameras follow the teams of computer programmers, app developers and salespeople as they manage a network of restaurants and delivery riders that together have transformed the takeaway experience

programme.title: Heston's Feasts
programme.desc: Heston Blumenthal decides to recreate the sensual thrills of 19th-century gothic horror novels. He makes a blood risotto starter and an edible Frankenstein's monster, before treating his guests to a Marquis de Sade-inspired dessert in the form of their own graves. Diners include Ulrika Jonsson, Nicholas Parsons and Colin Murray

programme.title: Nazi Treasure Hunters
programme.desc: A team of experts attempts to track down art looted from across Europe under Hitler's orders, with items worth billions still missing to this day. In Austria, Conor Woodman explores the salt mine where Allied soldiers recovered the majority of Hitler's stolen art in 1945, but meets local treasure hunters and investigative journalists who are convinced some of it was smuggled out and is today hidden in nearby homes and mountain hideouts

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: As the furlough scheme comes to an end, the programme follows the response to a job advert for a minimum-wage server role at a Manchester restaurant. Almost 1,000 people apply, including Katie, a cabin services attendant; Faye, a cruise ship dancer; Jake, a hotel manager; and John, a ticket inspector. We get to know them, as well as Abi, the recruitment consultant in charge of narrowing down the field; and Kerry, a mum-of-two who lost her job at Bentley and is desperate to find a new position to avoid the family losing their home. Through the lens of this one position, Dispatches explores the jobs crisis brought on by Covid that is threatening to push unemployment over three million by Christmas

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Insurance worker Zoe Prince prepares an Italian-themed menu for the first dinner party in Doncaster, South Yorkshire. However, chip shop manager Martyn Bilby gets a frosty reception when he tries to hold the hand of fellow guest Signe Jase, and trading standards manager Tracey Hewer is on edge as soon as she hears a cat meowing upstairs

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Chip shop manager Martyn Bilby throws the second dinner party in Doncaster, and pulls out all the stops with his signature dish - a chocolate eclair swan on a blue jelly lake. The guests are asked to dress formally for the occasion, but two competitors struggle to maintain their dignity when they catch sight of an embarrassing photograph of the host

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third dinner-party challenge from Doncaster is hosted by trading standards manager Tracey Hewer. She hopes to win her guests over with a barrage of cupcakes, but the diners soon spot that her efforts have focused more on presentation than the taste of the food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Lecturer Signe Jase hosts the penultimate dinner party in Doncaster, preparing an adventurous menu of Latvian delicacies including herring salad and salted salmon. However, fussy eater Tracey refuses to try much of the food, which leaves Martyn unimpressed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Amusement arcade supplier Barry Hill hosts the final dinner party in Doncaster, and hopes to impress his guests with a magic act, a celebrity butler and a dip in his pool, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies draws on her property expertise to help South Wales couple Neil and Julie find a holiday home around Almunecar on southern Spain's Costa Tropical

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Tracey and Gareth Sadd love the northern part of Tenerife and are keen to find a bolt-hole that they can escape to regularly. Presenter Jasmine Harman searches the local market to find properties to match the couple's £110,000 budget in the hope that they'll like one of them enough to make an offer

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the Old Orleton Inn in Wellington, Shropshire, where an award-winning breakfast is on offer - but a lack of showers does not go down well

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway
programme.desc: Two strangers with building experience and plenty of enthusiasm buy a bungalow at auction in the market town of Glossop, and work to give this tired house a new lease of life

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray becomes the butt of embarrassing jibes for failing to consider Debra's feelings in a social crisis, and vows to be more attentive in future. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray gets the chance to cover the Super Bowl for his newspaper - but feels guilty about not asking Debra to accompany him. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Wilkinsburg in Pennsylvania, home to Ms Jean's Southern Cuisine, which was opened by retired special-education teacher Jean Gould. During the chef's attempt to save the business from disaster, he discovers her soul-food restaurant resembles a dentist's waiting room and finds a lot of tension between Jean and her employees, who claim she is a Jekyll-and-Hyde character

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island. The no-nonsense chef struggles to persuade hot-headed owner Abby to make his suggested changes, and a confrontation results in him being thrown out of the building in the middle of a dinner service. The eatery's co-owner and financier begs Gordon to return, but his success hinges on his ability to win Abby over

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps Tracey and Stephen from Staffordshire search for a new home in the Spanish province of Malaga with a budget of £100,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: Greg and Helen Watson have bought a home in one of the most expensive areas of Sheffield, South Yorkshire, but it's too cramped for their needs and needs renovating. What's more, their third child is due in 18 weeks and they are desperate to move in before then. Architects Howard Evans and Prue Chiles are given the job, but with the Covid-19 lockdown, the wettest month on record and some major design differences, the build is in danger of collapsing before their £120,000 budget runs out

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

The signature challenge features a classic quiche, while the technical round requires the bakers to master a popular retro sweet treat. For their final showstopper task, the contestants must keep their cool while preparing an ice cream cake before judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood pick this week's star baker and decide who will be leaving the tent

programme.title: Educating Greater Manchester
programme.desc: The documentary series following life at Harrop Fold School returns three years on, featuring a new generation of year sevens who already have a reputation among staff members for mischief. The new series also catches up with youngsters from the 2017 series, who are now moving into year 10. The school is on high alert after a member of the public calls in, claiming to have seen a pupil with a knife, forcing Mr Povey and his staff to instigate bag searches

programme.title: The Bridge
programme.desc: The team wakes up to the realisation that more than half of the bridge still needs building - and that they will likely lose a team member too. programme.desc: Charlie and Alan try to set Jake a good example by throwing a party for their mother, hoping it will teach him to be more respectful toward Judith. Berta's sister Daisy is hired to cater, but makes the event memorable for all the wrong reasons

programme.desc: The agents chase almost £3,000 owed by Indian takeaway owners, but when the staff deny any knowledge of the debt, the agents threaten to seize kitchen equipment. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Max and Steve in East London try to recover over £7,000 owed by a restaurant owner for an unpaid gas bill, while officers Gareth and Mitch in Gloucestershire seek just under £3,000 from the owner of a car wash. Stewart and Vic are in Manchester trying to recover nearly £5,000 owed by a blinds and shutters supplier to a dissatisfied customer

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The enforcement officers visit a former professional footballer who owes £4,500 in unpaid legal fees, and in London the officers chase up a £4,000 debt owed by a car dealer. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: The designer brings home a puppy, which she and Will adopt - much to the dismay of Karen and Jack, who worry about what effect a new addition to the household will have on their friends

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: The flatboats discover to their delight that they can hear everything that goes on in the apartment below through a heating vent - including the juicy details of an extramarital affair. In the end, their constant eavesdropping leaves Jack feeling neglected, and in revenge he lampoons them in the play he is writing

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Franklin and Kady plant some seeds in the ground to symbolise their growing affection, while Jay tells Michael that their love life will improve if they are celibate for six months

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Junior submits a cartoon in a competition and wins first prize, so Michael takes him to meet TV executives to try to get his talent noticed. Meanwhile, Claire threatens to break up with Tony unless he can bring something fresh into their relationship.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Watford builder David Simpson has a fight on his hands when his long-term tenant moves her boyfriend in and suddenly decides to stop paying - and when he tries to evict her, she makes life difficult. In Woolwich, lawyer Chris Sharpe helps a client whose property has been taken over by squatters, who have changed the locks and claim they are legitimately renting the house

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The owner of a tanning salon regrets letting an employee move into a house he owns when he is faced with complaints from the neighbours about wild parties and £3,000 in unpaid rent. A couple managing a property for their daughter arrange to sell it, only to find the tenant refuses to leave, while a housing enforcement officer goes in search of a landlord who has left a tenant without light, heat or running water

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben try to drill through the locks on a property to evict the residents, only to find to their surprise that the door has been modified with special reinforced metal. Delroy and Brian try to reclaim money a garage owes to a customer and are shocked by the condition of the vehicle in question, and a woman who has acted as guarantor for her sister's tenancy does not realise the extent of her responsibilities

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement agents evict a large group of squatters barricaded into a disused nursery in London, and have to resort to smashing their way in as they refuse to leave. Meanwhile, agents in Bristol try to recover over £10,000 owed by a plumbing business to a supplier, and emotions run high when they attempt to evict a tenant who pleads her innocence in west London

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An episode combining new and unforgettable past cases. The High Court Enforcement Agents head to Manchester to track down over £5,000-worth of debt, and seize an expensive car in the process. Later in south London, the agents deal with a violent debtor who threatens them with a concealed weapon, and in Liverpool, they are met with lies and aggression from a mechanic who owes nearly £3,000

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Vic become party to a fractured family's school fee woes in Staffordshire and Del and Dael need to reclaim £3,500 after a rental van was returned badly damaged. Stewart and Elmor are in Warwickshire, where the members of a household blame their predicament on a scheming landlord whose subsequent arrival sparks a fierce reaction, while Iain helps Stewart remove a young mother from her Lancashire home

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Two new officers chase a gang of youths spotted joyriding around an Essex village in a stolen car. A counsellor is called out to avert a potential suicide on the M25, and a thief's attempts to misdirect the team fall flat when damning evidence of his crimes is found in his car

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team is forced to intervene when a man is assaulted in the street by his wife. Officers set out on the trail of one of the largest stolen car operations in Essex, and the interceptors put their vehicles to the test when the driver of a hijacked 4x4 goes off road in an attempt to lose them

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Yashvi aims to find inconsistencies in the evidence against Ned, who is frightened by his dreams, and confesses they feel like memories

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Amber's hesitance at accepting help from Dean confuses him, and Willow has to step in. Colby's dangerous affair with Taylor puts everyone at risk, and Bella tries talking to her

programme.title: Greatest Ever Celebrity Wind Ups
programme.desc: Joe Pasquale revisits hilarious celebrity pranks, with first-hand accounts from the people responsible for staging the tricks, and the unfortunate stars on the receiving end

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Featuring a single mum and her daughter who faced problems when they moved into a new flat in Milton Keynes because of a resident in the same block. Plus, the case of a Manchester man and his son whose life in a new flat turned into a nightmare when they were viciously turned upon in the form of a racist attack by one of their neighbours

programme.title: Carrie (2013)
programme.desc: A repressed teenage girl is tormented at school by bullies and at home by her fanatically religious mother. She begins to develop psychic powers and when her prom night results in one final humiliation, she snaps and uses her abilities to wreak a terrible revenge on everyone who has made her life a misery. Horror remake, starring Chloe Grace Moretz and Julianne Moore

programme.title: Wentworth Prison
programme.desc: Judy sabotages an important presentation for Ann and incurs her wrath, but secures confidential information for Ruby, while Allie is left to contend with a dangerous Lou Kelly

programme.title: Me & My 10 Kids: Mega Families
programme.desc: Heading to the Kent coast means a large order at the chip shop for one family with a high head count, while in Swindon, a gender reveal party descends into chaos

programme.title: It's Your Fault I'm Fat
programme.desc: Cleo is 16 and weighs in at just over 23 stone thanks to a diet of freezer food and fizzy drinks, but she and her family change their lifestyles to try to halt their weight gain

programme.title: Empire
programme.desc: Giselle assigns the Lyon men new roles across the company, as well as instructing Becky to make positive noises about the artists on their roster

programme.title: Empire

programme.title: Columbo: Fade Into Murder (1976)
programme.desc: An actor who plays a detective on a soap opera is being blackmailed by his ex-lover, who is also his producer. Convinced that playing a sleuth makes him clever enough to get away with murder, he kills her and frames her husband - but has reckoned without the intervention of the crumpled cop. Crime drama, with Peter Falk and William Shatner

programme.title: Columbo: Lady in Waiting (1971)
programme.desc: A desperate woman is determined to rid herself of her domineering brother and gain control of the family business, so hatches a plan to shoot him and claim she thought he was a burglar. Although her plan seems to have worked, her new-found power goes to her head - and she also has to contend with Columbo, who is convinced of her guilt. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Leslie Nielsen and Susan Clark

programme.title: Columbo: Lovely but Lethal (1973)
programme.desc: A cosmetics company is rocked by the revelation that a pirated version of their latest product is on the market, and then, shortly afterwards, one of their chemists is found murdered. But when the shabby sleuth scrutinises the case, he suspects the events are linked to a rival company. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Vincent Price, Martin Sheen and Vera Miles

programme.title: Columbo: Mind Over Mayhem (1974)
programme.desc: A scientist is overjoyed when his son follows in his footsteps, receiving widespread acclaim for a revolutionary new theory. When a fellow boffin produces evidence of plagiarism, the ruthless father resorts to murder to save his son from a scandal. But he reckons without the dishevelled detective, who sees through his efforts to make the killing look like the work of burglars. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Jose Ferrer and Lew Ayres

programme.title: Columbo: A Bird in the Hand (1992)
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler with a mountain of debts comes up with a plan to make some easy money. He plants a bomb under his wealthy uncle's car in the hope of inheriting a large legacy - but a hit-and-run driver jeopardises the entire scheme and Columbo is soon sniffing around for clues. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Tyne Daly, Greg Evigan and Don S Davis

programme.title: Columbo: A Friend in Deed (1974)
programme.desc: A Californian police commissioner helps a rich, influential friend to conceal his complicity in murdering his own wife - but reckons without detective Columbo's timely intervention and his dogged determination to bring the truth to light. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Richard Kiley and Rosemary Murphy

programme.title: Columbo: Murder with Too Many Notes (2000)
programme.desc: Oscar-winning composer Findlay Crawford relies on his assistant Gabriel to do all the hard work, but the younger musician demands recognition. To protect his reputation, Findlay kills Gabriel with a time-delayed drug to give himself the perfect alibi - but the slovenly sleuth sees through his ruse. Detective drama, with Peter Falk and Billy Connolly

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The murders of a university president and his assistant present the detectives with a number of suspects, including a controversial academic, a graduate student and an ambitious woman with her eye on the top job. Drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: John Drake, known to the team as career criminal Johnny D, faces trial for sex trafficking, rape, assault and kidnapping. However, as ADA Barba shores up the state's case against Drake, Benson's adoption of baby Noah - Drake's biological son - becomes entangled in the legal proceedings. As an intense courtroom showdown gets under way, the SVU faces a threat that could change the face of the team for ever. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hartigay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team is forced to return to an old crime scene, and when a case is taken to court, blackmail and deception lead to dramatic events

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The unit's counterparts in Atlanta visit New York for a conference, one of the detectives reports being raped and Rollins decides it is time to reveal a secret. Detective drama chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Kelli Giddish

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson investigates when a girl is invited to meet her celebrity crush, and is later found assaulted in an alley - and the star becomes the main suspect in the case. Hard-hitting series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team looks into a raid on a naval base, and Dr Cyril Taft - the surgeon who saved Gibbs' life - experiences the thrill of assisting on an investigation. Assigned to treat Gibbs' suspect, Taft manages to uncover evidence that may prove crucial to solving the case. Meanwhile, DiNozzo pays his old flame Jeanne Benoit a visit as he chases a lead involving doctors in Sudan. Guest starring John Cryer and Scottie Thompson

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A day spent working on a cut-and-dried case leaves the team free to spend some time away from work, and while McGee and Delilah argue over the importance of keeping shop-talk to a minimum, DiNozzo ends up boring his dinner date with crime-solving tales. However, the agents' personal plans are all interrupted as, one-by-one, they realise errors have been made in closing their latest investigation. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.desc: A simple surveillance case at a karaoke bar in Little Korea escalates to full danger, forcing Shade and Angie to call in familiar reinforcements for help

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Matt's ex-wife comes for a surprise visit after Jules invites her to stay with them, while Matt and Angie are hired by a husband to determine if his wife has a stalker

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A former soldier comes to trial for the murder of a Yemeni immigrant he suspected of being a terrorist. With the events of September 11 still fresh in everyone's minds, McCoy tries to find a way of ensuring the jury's fears and prejudices do not influence their verdict. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called to investigate the murder of a grief counsellor who claimed he could communicate with the dead, and discover he was a conman with a host of disgruntled clients, any one of whom might have had a motive for killing him. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A sweatshop boss is killed in what initially appears to be a violent but fairly routine crime prompted by a workplace affair. Briscoe and Green begin their investigation by working on the assumption that they are looking for a wronged partner with a grievance - but inquiries gradually lead them to an illegal immigrant who claims the dead man had coerced his partner into acting as a surrogate mother

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A teenager beats a fellow foster home resident to death, and his lawyer seeks a not guilty vedict, claiming the youth is genetically predisposed to violent behaviour because he possesses an extra Y chromosome

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A worker at a meat-packing plant is killed in the workplace, prompting Logan and Briscoe to turn their attention to the man's disgruntled Russian bride. The pair learn the foreign widow married in the hope of a better life, but fell in love with a co-worker - and out of favour with her husband

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Logan and Briscoe race to find the kidnapped son of a wealthy businessman who was is arrested while trying to exchange a ransom for the boy, and now threatens to interfere with the investigation

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs, McGee and Torres travel to a remote area of Paraguay, controlled by a violent group of rebels, in an attempt to locate a missing Navy Seal who disappeared during an unsanctioned trip

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The American crime drama returns with the team still reeling from the Department of Defence investigation, with Ziva, McGee and Tony having handed in their badges. Parsons continues his inquiries into Gibbs and his agents, but events take a turn when an explosion kills the Secretary of the US Navy and seriously injures the director of Homeland Security. When attempts are made on the lives of Gibbs and Tony, it appears that all of the NCIS agents are in mortal danger. Starring Mark Harmon and Colin Hanks

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Sarah Porter, the new Secretary of the Navy, charges Gibbs and the team with finding terrorist group the Brotherhood of Doubt, which was responsible for killing her predecessor. She expects the group's next target to be billionaire Tomas Mendez, who spends his money trying to defeat terrorism, but whose motives may not be entirely altruistic. Meanwhile, Tony flies to Tel Aviv, where new Mossad director Orli Elbaz reveals they have a report of a possible sighting of Ziva at a kibbutz she went to as a child. Crime drama, guest starring Marina Sirtis

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An explosion at an apartment building brings navy officer Terence Keith to the team's attention and it transpires he had been on medication for anxiety, a condition that had led to him being ejected from a pilot's training course. Ducky's profile of Keith suggests that he may be unstable and about to exact revenge for having his dream of becoming a fighter ace taken away from him, and evidence points to him intending to carry out a suicide attack

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A woman is found murdered and Gibbs and McGee are called in when she is discovered to be carrying ID bearing the name Sgt Patricia Moreno, a US marine known to have died several years earlier. The victim is discovered to have come to America from Afghanistan and a necklace reveals a fingerprint that leads the team to a known assassin. Guest starring Lolita Davidovich

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Barba faces off against two ruthless defence attorneys who will stop at nothing to protect Yates

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team is forced to negotiate a difficult case when a teenager with gender identity issues is attacked by three boys. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Amaro declines an invite to his father's wedding, but he is forced to get involved in his dad's life after a fight breaks out at the ceremony. Danny Pino stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A rape victim is found in the street - groggy after being drugged - and in her confused state she mistakenly accuses the wrong man of attacking her, with alarming consequences. The team sets up a trap in a bid to find the identity of the true criminal. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An American couple are attacked in Iraq, in the very same spot a group of US Special Ops snipers were ambushed six months earlier. Determined to get to the bottom of the case, Gibbs is forced to speak to Aaron Davis, the only survivor of the first assault, who is now struggling through PTSD at the Walter Reed Medical Centre. The 300th episode of the military crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Navy Public Affairs Officer is killed, and when the team takes up the case, both the man's wife and his mistress emerge as potential suspects. Each woman offering a very different take on the chain of events that led to the murder, and the investigators are forced to decide which of the two is telling the truth. Meanwhile, DiNozzo's father comes to the aid of a homeless woman, who makes a surprising claim about his relationship with her. Guest starring Robert Wagner

programme.title: Private Eyes

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Southerlyn arrest a homeless man on suspicion of killing a fellow vagrant and gather enough evidence to bring a prosecution - but a clever defence attorney tries to get him exonerated by arguing that the laws of decent society do not apply to people who live on the streets

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a bookmaker whose testimony led to the incarceration of a Mob boss 10 years previously. programme.desc: Briscoe and Logan are approached by a woman who claims she passed out in a taxi and awoke to find her newborn baby missing. Investigating her allegation, they uncover a gang who specialise in kidnapping children to order. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Christopher Noth

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: New York's district attorneys investigate the mysterious death of a stockbroker who was dating the daughter of a ruthless cosmetics mogul - and find themselves caught up in a wrangle over whether HRT withdrawal can be used as a defence in law. Police drama, guest starring Lucie Arnaz, with Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A jockey is shot dead, leading Fontana and Falco into the murkier side of horse racing, where they discover the victim's prized thoroughbred was bought by a corporate boss using embezzled funds. McCoy takes control in court, but a witness's emotional outburst and the defendant's disappearance put the case in jeopardy. Starring Dennis Farina, Michael Imperioli and Sam Waterston

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Sarah Porter, the new Secretary of the Navy, charges Gibbs and the team with finding terrorist group the Brotherhood of Doubt, which was responsible for killing her predecessor. programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team investigate when naval cryptanalyst Andrew Wells is shot dead in a park outside Baltimore. At the scene, Tony spots a man who was one of his informants from 15 years earlier when he was a police officer, but who went into hiding after a bid to bring down the Russian mobsters he worked for went wrong. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team works with Abigail Borin of the Coast Guard Investigative Service after a highly suspicious explosion and fire on board an oil rig kills a US marine corps reservist. Abby detects malware in the platform's computer systems, while Ducky finds traces on the victim's body that lead to a lawyer who works for the oil company. Back in the office, a prankster is bringing some light relief and although the likeliest suspect is Tony, he denies any involvement. Crime drama, guest starring Diane Neal

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames examine the murder of a mother-of-two. The investigation leads them to a counterfeiting operation and the home of an actor - who puts them on the trail of an important official document. Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Changes are afoot that will affect the team, who investigate a case of child neglect, and take on the child's mother and social services

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Racial tensions begin to boil over after an unarmed black man is shot by police from another precinct, and three officers are put on trial

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When the assistant of a female videogame developer is attacked at a convention the team goes undercover online and discovers a world of misogynistic abuse by gamers. The detectives think they have found the perpetrators of the attack - but another attack is planned against the victim's employer

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team tries to stop a sex-trafficking ring after a mother goes undercover to find her daughter, who has been taken by the gang, and later Benson uncovers a shocking truth. Hard-hitting and emotional drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony finds himself in a difficult position when his identity is stolen. Worse yet, multiple fraudsters make use of his status as a special agent to blackmail US senators, and as the chain of events begins to spiral out of control, it is left to the real Dinozzo to bring the perpetrators to justice. Naval crime drama, starring Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs teams up with his old friend Senior FBI Agent TC Fornell after two British prisoners, including a former spy, escape captivity and flee to the US via a shipping container. Meanwhile, McGee is busy hunting for a new apartment, and is determined to discover how DiNozzo managed to snag his lavish home. Naval crime drama, guest starring Joe Spano

programme.title: Fantasy Homes by the Sea
programme.desc: Jenni Falconer helps a Sussex couple find a perfect seaside home in Puglia, Italy

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to the Isle of Sheppey in Kent to meet two extraordinary dads, Garry and Kyle, who have adopted four vulnerable children - three of whom have special needs - to give them the best life possible. But their cramped three-bedroom bungalow is making family life difficult. So to give this family the space they so desperately need, the DIY SOS builders are undertaking their most ambitious project yet - to demolish the bungalow and build a bespoke five-bedroom house in its place. But with just nine days to complete the task, it looks like being their toughest one yet

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles meets midwife and kidney patient Sascha, who has to undergo intense dialysis sessions for hours on end, five days a week. This places the mother-of-four's body under great stress and the constant threat of blood clots gives her a life expectancy of just a few years. Determined to help, the DIY SOS team, bolstered by the local tradespeople and volunteers of Welwyn Garden City, renovate her home to include a dedicated dialysis room, offering her the chance of many more years with her family

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team return to Veterans Street in Manchester, where, in 2015, with the help of Prince William and Prince Harry, DIY SOS launched their most ambitious project yet - transforming a derelict street into a vibrant community for veterans and local people. This time they build the final home for decorated former soldier and single dad Simon Flores, whose foot was blown off by a roadside bomb during a patrol in Iraq

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Raj Bisram hunt for antiques in the West Country, visiting Bath, Bristol and Hungerford, before boarding a ferry to the Isle of Wight to search for nautical items

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and James Braxton are on a buying spree on the Isle of Wight, where Raj unravels the tale of one former famous local and James takes a peek beneath the waves

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Raj Bisram head out to hunt for antiques in the Somerset area, finding a pair of Staffordshire figures and an experimental vase, ending up at an auction in Woking

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Raj Bisram's antique challenge takes them from the New Forest to Shrewsbury, with visits to a motor museum and Twyford Waterworks along the way

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Only seven pounds separates antiques experts James Braxton and Raj Bisram as they set off in Cheshire heading to their final auction in Somerset. On their journey, Raj hears why a group of daredevil playboys decided to drive their car in to the Savoy to join them for dinner and James learns why a pint in the Crown and Anchor pub played a vital role in verifying the quality of silver in 1773

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps house hunters find their dream homes in popular winter sun destinations. Potential buyers explore the beautiful and serene island of Crete

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun

After falling in love with Cyprus on their honeymoon, there was only ever going to be one place they considered making that new start and Laura Hamilton shows them five potential homes for their budget of £55,000

programme.title: Cash in the Spare Room
programme.desc: In Scotland, a couple want to transform their wooden shed into a profitable holiday let. In Bath, a woman needs Sarah's help to convert her daughter's bedroom

programme.title: The Nolans Go Cruising
programme.desc: In Barcelona, Linda gets set up on a dating app to help in her search for romance after losing the love of her life. And, the ladies reflect on their past loves and losses

So to give this family the space they so desperately need, the DIY SOS builders are undertaking their most ambitious project yet - to demolish the bungalow and build a bespoke five-bedroom house in its place. But with just nine days to complete the task, it looks like being their toughest one yet

programme.title: Emergency

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies
programme.desc: The doctors chart the physical effects of heavy drinking and risky behaviour as they put four young British holiday-makers under 24-hour surveillance in Magaluf. Christian Jessen meets Dan, who has a large hole in his face, Jaya wants to know whether Dawn Harper can help her reclaim her voice and Pixie McKenna sees a woman who is hoping for some help with childhood burns to her chest and back. Plus, the EB truck is in Manchester, where Dawn meets a man whose testicles are in a twist

programme.title: Nightwatch: Emergency After Dark

programme.title: Nightwatch: Emergency After Dark

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

Screen printer Daniel Heath hopes his bold designs will make a wooden tea trolley desirable again, and Sarah falls in love with a retro box of camera-developing equipment

programme.title: Salvage Hunters

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: SPCA staff and volunteers are called in to remove almost 200 birds and mammals from an animal sanctuary after allegations of neglect. An investigator is just in time to save four chihuahuas from starvation, while nine dogs and four cats are rescued from a filthy house

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi heads to the Kent seaside town of Ramsgate to help with the launch of a new venture, but discovers it is plagued by the same age-old problems. Once a summer retreat for a young Queen Victoria, the historic Albion House was facing an uncertain future until Gay and John Haines stepped in with plans to convert it into a 14-bedroom boutique hotel. However, financial disaster is looming with the million-pound budget having been blown and deadlines missed. Can Alex stop Albion House going bust before it has even opened?

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: DIY SOS highlights the plight of nation's 250,000 young carers, who look after their parents on a daily basis. Blackpool Carers Trust, which is supported by funding from Children in Need, provides limited out-of-school respite and training activities for some of these carers - but its current centre is bursting at the seams. It has now inherited a run-down property, which is bigger but will require the renovation of a neglected building and a huge overgrown garden - and that's where Nick and the team come in, with help from designer Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen

programme.desc: A desperate Trill takes the group hostage and confiscates the Dax symbiote, placing Jadzia's life in peril. Sci-fi adventure, starring Terry Farrell

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Following a conversation with Paul, Melinda discovers the truth about her family, and several other revelations swiftly follow

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Knight Valiant arrives in Camelot to compete in the annual sword-fighting tournament and faces Arthur in the final. Merlin realises the combatant has a ruse to beat his opponents that could spell death for the prince - but struggles to convince King Uther of his findings. Will Mellor guest stars

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The disturbing case of 53-year-old German Horst Kroener, who was jailed in 2016 for murdering his Filipina wife in her sleep

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: The events that led Lorraine Thorpe to become Britain's youngest female double murderer at the age of 15. She and 41-year-old Paul Clarke tortured and killed their friend Rosalyn Hunt, before smothering Thorpe's father Desmond to death with a cushion after he threatened to go to the police. The programme features interviews with Rosalyn's brother as well as detectives from the joint Norfolk and Suffolk investigation team

programme.title: The Force: Essex
programme.desc: The police's fight against knife crime in the county continues when a dispute between neighbours gets out of control

programme.title: Brit Cops
programme.desc: Documentary series following the work of police officers in Lincolnshire as they tackle crime

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A Michigan driver demolishes a house with his van, police get a surprise when they raid a suspect's home, and officers chase a burglar who is determined to escape. Plus, footage of drunk drivers and speeding youths

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: The story of struggling musician David Evans, who was imprisoned in the notorious Los Teques jail in Venezuela for trying to smuggle cocaine out of the country. He explains how he came to be involved in the scheme, the events of his arrest and the importance of his guitar during his incarceration. The programme also follows him as he is reunited with his girlfriend at the end of his sentence

programme.title: Border Security USA
programme.desc: The coastguards come to the rescue when a boat containing migrants from the Dominican Republic becomes stranded at sea

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Follow the work of the New Zealand Customs agents in their quest to prevent illegal items passing through the country's borders.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Follow the work of the New Zealand Customs agents in their quest to prevent illegal items passing through the country's borders.

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: Another edition of the fly-on-the-wall documentary accessing the world of national security at Australia's biggest airports, following customs and immigration officers as they go about their daily business of tackling drug runners, illegal immigrants and terrorists

programme.title: The Listening Post

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Ash must disarm a bomb in the London Underground that uses a new type of fuse, and discovers that he may still have a chance with Susan

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Ash asks Susan to marry him as the team heads for the coast in preparation for D-Day

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: An injured Ash is rushed to hospital, his confidence shattered - but an emergency forces him to return to duty. Final episode of the Second World war drama

programme.title: Pop Pirates (1984)
programme.desc: A pop group enters a talent contest, but their chances are jeopardised by the lead singer's involvement in video piracy. Drama, starring Spencer Chandler and Roger Daltrey

programme.title: A Stitch in Time (1963)
programme.desc: A butcher's bumbling assistant causes no end of accidents at work, the latest of which has landed his boss in hospital. While visiting, he meets a little girl who has not spoken since her parents died, and resolves to put a smile on the orphan's face. Slapstick comedy, starring Norman Wisdom, Edward Chapman, Jerry Desmonde, Lucy Appleby and Jill Melford

programme.title: All Coppers Are (1971)
programme.desc: A young policeman and a small-time crook are both involved with the same girl. Drama, starring Martin Potter, Julia Foster and David Essex

programme.title: Jungle Street (1960)
programme.desc: Two men commit a robbery, but when one of them takes the rap for it, the other muscles in on his girlfriend. Crime drama, starring Jill Ireland, David McCallum and Kenneth Cope

programme.title: Lunch Hour (1961)
programme.desc: A junior executive turns his mind to romance, and sets off for a night of passion after reserving a room at a hotel - only for his torrid plans to go awry when his short-term relationship with a designer takes an unexpected turn. Comedy, starring Robert Stephens, Shirley Anne Field, Michael Robbins and Nigel Davenport

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb helps a couple search for a dream holiday home on the Greek islands of Paros and Naxos, including a dwelling on the beach, a chic urban home and a beautiful farmhouse with seven stunning sun-terraces

programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams visits Ashford and the Medway towns of Kent to recount grisly tales from the Second World War about bodies found in the rubble of the Blitz which turned out to be victims of murder

programme.title: Capital Conversation
programme.desc: Author and entrepreneur Michael Hayman interviews the business leaders at the heart of London's most exciting success stories

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: After passing their riding course - one of the toughest in the country - the new troopers graduate. The latest additions to the regiment parade in full ceremonial uniform to mark the occasion - but the last such outing of the season also provides a chance for the soldiers to reflect on fallen comrades in conflicts from World War Two to Iraq

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Dorien may have ulterior motives for inviting Tracey to a posh event, while Sharon makes a tidy profit out of fake Rolling Stones T-shirts. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Diana: Last Days of a Princess
programme.desc: Genevieve O'Reilly and Patrick Baladi star as Diana, Princess of Wales and Dodi Al Fayed in a docu-drama charting the couple's last days, culminating in the fatal crash in the Alma Tunnel, Paris. Including interviews with Mohamed Al Fayed, bodyguard Kez Wingfield and masseuse Myriah Daniels

programme.title: Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: Part two of two. An alcoholic detective pursues the infamous serial killer brutally murdering prostitutes in Victorian London. Many potential suspects present themselves, from an anti-royal demagogue to an actor whose stage portrayal of murderous evil is a little too convincing, but the inspector is convinced a conspiracy seeks to protect the ripper's identity. Thriller, with Michael Caine, Jane Seymour, Lewis Collins and Harry Andrews

programme.title: Dead Ringers (1988)
programme.desc: Identical twin gynaecologists Elliot and Beverly share everything in their life. Elliot, self-assured and experienced, passes his unwitting sexual conquests to shy and sensitive Beverly when he tires of them. However, when Beverly falls in love for the first time with a patient, the affair drives the brothers apart - and both men begin to lose their grip on their sanity. David Cronenberg's psychological thriller, with Jeremy Irons in a dual role alongside Genevieve Bujold

programme.title: Perfect Skin (2018)
programme.desc: Katia Matuschak, an 18-year-old Polish woman, embarks on a relationship with mysterious tattoo artist Bob Reid. However, their relationship takes a dark turn as her fascination with him grows, and in an attempt to fulfil his dream, he kidnaps her. Psychological horror, starring Richard Brake, Natalia Kostrzewa and Jo Woodcock

programme.title: The Repo Man
programme.desc: Part one of two. In recession-hit Britain, many people have turned to finance companies to purchase items over a fixed period of time. This documentary follows the life and work of bailiff Sean James as he confronts debtors across the nation who fail to keep up their repayments. Supported by a rotating crew of part-time agents, including former world-champion boxer Marcus, ex-Marine 'H' and scaffolder Reece, Sean is persistent and has no intention of leaving empty-handed when he tracks down his targets

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Documentary exploring areas of the capital, beginning with Shooters Hill, Charlton, Greenwich and Blackheath.

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: A group of 14 tourists is brought together for a trip across the Continent. The coach leaves London, bound for Amsterdam - but tensions between the travellers soon erupt

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Presenter Amanda Lamb accompanies mother and daughter Carol and Helen Giles to Florida's Gulf Coast in search of a house for £100,000. Among the properties featured are a three-bedroom detached house and a beachfront apartment

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: McMeer eats all the mangos on the island, so Zigby and his friends set sail in search of more

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Everyone thinks a Bigfoot has stolen Lawrence's special shell when it disappears

programme.title: Zoo Babies
programme.desc: A heart warming and inspiring series that welcomes the arrival of new members of the animal kingdom in Zoo's around the world, as well as showcasing endangered species being born in captivity

programme.title: Underwater World for Kids
programme.desc: An underwater adventure that takes in the many natural wonders and magical sea creatures above and below our oceans

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: Norwich couple Simon and Caitlin embark on an ambitious project under the watchful eye of expert Sarah Beeny. They plan to buy a former council house, invest all their savings and completely renovate it in the hope that a subsequent sale will raise enough money to move onto the next rung of the property ladder

programme.title: Diana: Last Days of a Princess
programme.desc: Genevieve O'Reilly and Patrick Baladi star as Diana, Princess of Wales and Dodi Al Fayed in a docu-drama charting the couple's last days, culminating in the fatal crash in the Alma Tunnel, Paris. Including interviews with Mohamed Al Fayed, bodyguard Kez Wingfield and masseuse Myriah Daniels

programme.title: Battle of Britain: The Real Story
programme.desc: James Holland explores the Battle of Britain from the German point of view. The author focuses on the tactics, technology and intelligence available to both nations, and examines how they decided to use their resources. He also gains access to first-hand testimonies from German pilots, and diaries and documents that reveal a previously unknown side to this confrontation

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the story of the resistance movement set up around the coast by Winston Churchill to harass Nazi invaders should the Germans reach British soil

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the story of the resistance movement set up around the coast by Winston Churchill to harass Nazi invaders should the Germans reach British soil

programme.title: Angels One Five (1953)
programme.desc: A new recruit joins a squadron of British fighter pilots in the summer of 1940, as they prepare to face a confrontation with the overwhelming forces of the Luftwaffe over the English Channel, while the ground crew at their base anxiously awaits reports from the conflict. Second World War adventure, starring Jack Hawkins and John Gregson

programme.title: Assassin for Hire (1951)
programme.desc: An assassin who kills to finance his violinist brother's career is tricked into confessing his crimes by a wily police inspector. Drama, starring Sydney Tafler, Ronald Howard, Katherine Blake and John Hewer

programme.title: Mantovani TV Specials
programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Soho and Milllwall, with fascinating facts for locals and tourists alike. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: British house-hunters Ric and Nita Halstead, who are seeking a dream home in Miami, receive expert advice before buying. Amanda Lamb shows them round an art deco house, a Mediterranean-style villa and a Florida ranch

programme.title: Battle of Britain: The Real Story
programme.desc: James Holland explores the Battle of Britain from the German point of view. The author focuses on the tactics, technology and intelligence available to both nations, and examines how they decided to use their resources. He also gains access to first-hand testimonies from German pilots, and diaries and documents that reveal a previously unknown side to this confrontation

programme.title: Diana: Last Days of a Princess
programme.desc: Genevieve O'Reilly and Patrick Baladi star as Diana, Princess of Wales and Dodi Al Fayed in a docu-drama charting the couple's last days, culminating in the fatal crash in the Alma Tunnel, Paris. Including interviews with Mohamed Al Fayed, bodyguard Kez Wingfield and masseuse Myriah Daniels

programme.title: Once a Soldier
programme.desc: Open for over 300 years and home to 320 old soldiers, the Royal Hospital in Chelsea is under threat. This series follows the residents for a year of their lives

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: The story of the havoc caused by the V1 doodlebugs and the V2 rockets, and of the thousands of deaths that undermined the morale of a war-weary civilian population

programme.title: Murder Investigation Team
programme.desc: Lindsey Coulson stars in this gritty drama series following the work of the Metropolitan Police's Murder Investigation Team. The unit's first case takes them to the familiar streets of Sun Hill, where Matt Boyden and a teenager have been killed in a drive-by shooting. The local force join the MIT to establish who the intended victim was

programme.title: IBA Boxing
programme.desc: IBA Boxing brings you the best of the adrenaline pumping fights and knock out action from their legendary events.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney asks whether a life of crime is worth the risk, looking at how many criminals end up in prison

programme.title: Reaper (2014)
programme.desc: A death row inmate is sent to the electric chair, but the execution goes wrong and transforms him into a deadly supernatural creature that destroys everything in its path. He sets out to slaughter a group of criminals lying low in a hotel, but a hitch-hiker organises the crooks to fight back. Horror, starring Danny Trejo and Vinnie Jones

programme.title: Realm of the Damned (2017)
programme.desc: Graphic motion animation following Gothic monsters on a bloody rampage of redemption and damnation. Featuring the voices of David Vincent, Dani Filth and Jill Janus

programme.title: The Repo Man
programme.desc: Part two of two. Bailiff Sean James repossesses cars belonging to debtors who have taken out high-interest logbook loans and failed to keep up their repayments. During the worst snowfall in 30 years, he spots an opportunity to carry out his work while most people are stranded in their homes, and the programme meets those who fight tooth and nail to keep their vehicles, as well as drivers who have unknowingly bought cars with debt attached

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: As the passengers wait to see which couple will be voted off first, they leave behind Amsterdam's coffee bars and visit Brussels, where they sample local chocolate and beer

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The travellers cross the border into Germany, but trouble brews as some of them have problems waking up and stomaching the local food

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: Norwich couple Simon and Caitlin embark on an ambitious project under the watchful eye of expert Sarah Beeny. They plan to buy a former council house, invest all their savings and completely renovate it in the hope that a subsequent sale will raise enough money to move onto the next rung of the property ladder

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The lively zebra and his friends take part in the Island Cup competition

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The zebra builds a robot to play with, but his new friend causes chaos

programme.title: Zoo Babies
programme.desc: A heart warming and inspiring series that welcomes the arrival of new members of the animal kingdom in Zoo's around the world, as well as showcasing endangered species being born in captivity

programme.title: Underwater World for Kids
programme.desc: An underwater adventure that takes in the many natural wonders and magical sea creatures above and below our oceans

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: A south London couple gamble their savings in an attempt to raise enough cash to buy their dream home in the countryside. The plan is to renovate their two-bedroom former council flat so they can make money by renting it out for as much as possible. Property developer Sarah Beeny keeps an eye on their progress

programme.title: Boy Soldiers of WWII
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the truth behind the boys who lied about their age in order to enlist and fight in the Second World War, and their shocking stories from the frontline

programme.title: Once a Soldier
programme.desc: Open for over 300 years and home to 320 old soldiers, the Royal Hospital in Chelsea is under threat. This series follows the residents for a year of their lives

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: The story of the havoc caused by the V1 doodlebugs and the V2 rockets, and of the thousands of deaths that undermined the morale of a war-weary civilian population

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the story of the resistance movement set up around the coast by Winston Churchill to harass Nazi invaders should the Germans reach British soil

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the story of the resistance movement set up around the coast by Winston Churchill to harass Nazi invaders should the Germans reach British soil

programme.title: All Coppers Are (1971)
programme.desc: A young policeman and a small-time crook are both involved with the same girl. Drama, starring Martin Potter, Julia Foster and David Essex

programme.title: Piccadilly Incident (1946)
programme.desc: A Wren is pronounced missing in action, but returns three years later to find her husband has remarried. Melodrama, starring Anna Neagle and Michael Wilding

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Documentary exploring areas of the capital, beginning with Shooters Hill, Charlton, Greenwich and Blackheath.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb comes to the rescue of Peter Sullivan and Sally Turner, who are searching for an affordable holiday home on the Caribbean island of Barbados. Among the choices are a new apartment for £66,000 and a traditional villa

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the story of the resistance movement set up around the coast by Winston Churchill to harass Nazi invaders should the Germans reach British soil

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the story of the resistance movement set up around the coast by Winston Churchill to harass Nazi invaders should the Germans reach British soil

programme.title: Royal Cousins at War
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary examining what impact the relationships between cousins Nicholas II of Russia, Kaiser Wilhelm II of Germany and George V of the United Kingdom had on the outbreak of the First World War. This episode focuses on the story of the emerging divisions and rivalries between the inter-related royal houses of Europe during the 19th century. Featuring contributions by historians Karina Urbach, Miranda Carter and Piers Brendon. Tamsin Greig narrates

programme.title: Churchill's Traitors
programme.desc: An in-depth look at those who betrayed Winston Churchill during the Second World War, and the events that led to the attack on Pearl Harbour in December 1941

programme.title: Three Days In Auschwitz
programme.desc: Documentary following a film-maker on a series of visits to the site of the concentration camp, as he researches the fates of members of his family who died there

programme.title: Perfect Skin (2018)
programme.desc: Katia Matuschak, an 18-year-old Polish woman, embarks on a relationship with mysterious tattoo artist Bob Reid. However, their relationship takes a dark turn as her fascination with him grows, and in an attempt to fulfil his dream, he kidnaps her. Psychological horror, starring Richard Brake, Natalia Kostrzewa and Jo Woodcock

programme.title: Dead Ringers (1988)
programme.desc: Identical twin gynaecologists Elliot and Beverly share everything in their life. Elliot, self-assured and experienced, passes his unwitting sexual conquests to shy and sensitive Beverly when he tires of them. However, when Beverly falls in love for the first time with a patient, the affair drives the brothers apart - and both men begin to lose their grip on their sanity. David Cronenberg's psychological thriller, with Jeremy Irons in a dual role alongside Genevieve Bujold

programme.title: Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: Part two of two. An alcoholic detective pursues the infamous serial killer brutally murdering prostitutes in Victorian London. Many potential suspects present themselves, from an anti-royal demagogue to an actor whose stage portrayal of murderous evil is a little too convincing, but the inspector is convinced a conspiracy seeks to protect the ripper's identity. Thriller, with Michael Caine, Jane Seymour, Lewis Collins and Harry Andrews

programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Forest Hill, Hither Green and Cubitt Town. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.title: Fight Night
programme.desc: Carl Froch v George Groves. Another chance to see the bout for the WBA and IBF Super Middleweight titles, held at the Phones 4u Arena in Manchester. Froch avenged one of only two career defeats when outpointing Mikkel Kessler in his previous fight, and his greater experience at the highest level meant he went into this contest as the favourite. However, he could not afford to take Groves lightly, as the man 11 years his junior entered the match with an unblemished professional record

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Crystal Palace v Watford. Action from the 2012/13 Championship play-off final at Wembley Stadium, as the teams contested a place in the top flight alongside the already promoted Cardiff City and Hull City. Palace reached this match when Wilfried Zaha scored a brace in a 2-0 away win against Brighton & Hove Albion after a goalless draw in the first leg. Meanwhile, Watford bounced back from narrowly missing out on automatic promotion by overcoming Leicester City in dramatic fashion, with Troy Deeney scoring an injury time-winner on the counter after Manuel Almunia had saved a penalty

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Brentford v Yeovil Town. Action from the 2012/13 League One play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where the remaining place in the following season's Championship was decided. Brentford agonisingly missed out on automatic promotion on the final day of the regular campaign, but recovered to defeat Swindon Town on penalties in their semi-final, while Yeovil were 2-1 aggregate victors over Sheffield United

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Bradford City v Northampton Town. Action from the 2012/13 League Two play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where promotion to League One awaited the winners. The Bantams were making their second appearance of the season at Wembley having also reached the League Cup final following an outstanding giant-killing run, and they needed to come from behind to edge out Burton Albion to reach this stage. The Cobblers ended a run of recent poor form to win 1-0 in both legs of their semi-final against Cheltenham Town to move within one match of reaching the third tier of English football

programme.title: Football Years
programme.desc: A look back at the 1991-92 season, in which Manchester United and Leeds United fought for the title in the final campaign before the arrival of the Premiership. The Red Devils were favourites to end their long title drought as Liverpool faltered with an ageing side, but Howard Wilkinson's men refused to give up the chase
